name: The Botanist Social
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Pam Buss', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107829775833265139536/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIP-9GkylFlK3ZHN7Lsd2TQqboeCSSxDghC_cxCSyMcPsqvjA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Went here with 2 others prior to a show at Overture. We had a reservation and were  immediately seated.
The restaurant is long and narrow with the bar taking up one side. Very nice atmosphere. We each had a speciality drink; painkiller, clover club, and proprietary knowledge.
Cheese curd appetizer which was yummy.
Entrees included the lobster roll with truffle fries, shrimp risotto special and campanelle pasta. All our food was outstanding.
Service was excellent.
I recommend checking this place out.', 'time': 1768070029, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Shruti A', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100025568217789315713/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5CxdIlI0zzUHFLWCbVlSVETljbHns3EhQWqF03WaVEirZjw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'We really wanted to try this place and ended up coming with our two kids, even though it’s not especially kid-centric. name: Heritage Tavern
reviews:

name: Merchant Madison
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Sheri Mazariegos', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116137378980185648530/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVP7H7PqqjbKrVFFnd3BHOZMTrQHbytALTjIrD0TBgTSvhBVB7-OA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'Loved the general vibe of this place - decor and outdoor seating were great. Everyone that we encountered at Merchant were really welcoming and helpful - from the hostess to our waitress. We sat outdoors, which was really refreshing, could see the water at the end of the street.

The food was good, but not really 5 star worthy. The only item that we thought was memorably delicious were the deviled eggs - if you go, definitely give them a try. I had the Caesar salad, which I thought lacked taste and skimpy on dressing. My husband had the Friday fish fry - it wasn’t the traditional Wisconsin fish fry (cod and hash brown side) - it was sturgeon and seasoned fries. He said it was good - and the seasoned fries were delicious.

Street parking was tricky to find - fun area, lots of places, fun to walk around after and one street away from the capitol building - beautiful at night!', 'time': 1755008649, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Yuki', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113773529473312037999/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJkXQoJMS61KvZ-SqGzRZ-CWICY5tH-mBI1jU5l0cpDMNocDA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'Amazing atmosphere and great happy hour options. The cheese curds with hot honey and the crispy fries were delicious. Service was a bit slow and could be more attentive, but overall the food made it a good experience.', 'time': 1763730807, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Felicia Chang', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117663647922271524540/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVz9p8rb1eXxQRa5HVv778ZoKRp3-Ow7gZjpjLOrMWtSMJrVgL1=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Stopped by for some drinks and snacks on a Saturday night. The interiors are very pretty and romantic for a date night.', 'time': 1756181603, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'The Pirate Penguin', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105033101443484213340/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6ZoZKJAf2UxjXgcEm9q1bK8pkthfe59Ti359X1oInDKL1iXc=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'The food here was really good, but The Nightmare Before Christmas themed drinks and decorations were definitely the highlight of my dining experience,', 'time': 1767457130, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Scott Yee', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117761902928876686693/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-cvuNf_gDKJD0d9jc69or8zYU15Vh65QMw4T5xPbqx5MpPTU=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': "Took the family tonight for the holiday theme. They did a great job with the decorations and the service was pretty good. The food was not good for the price and in comparison to similar restaurants downtown. Specifically, the fish fry had a pretty limp celery slaw and the fish was not crispy. We ordered a side of fries for the kids to share because the kids meals didn't come with any sides and the portion was small and over salted. Drinks were small and good - I had a sazerac the was on the smaller size and my wife had eggnog that came in a small expressobcup.", 'time': 1766197520, 'translated': False}]

name: The Harvey House
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Grace SHEN', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100393307240619154972/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUVBovhJRSSl0rDxaQ_5VVH9o-nb-Azv3d_KOkmS-xSrVvMoHjxSg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'My husband and I came here for the first time to celebrate my birthday earlier this month. For a restaurant located close to downtown, having parking right at the entrance was such a pleasant surprise.

We were seated in a dining hall converted from a train car, which truly felt like dining aboard the Orient Express—such a fun and unique experience. Every staff member we interacted with, whether directly serving us or not, was incredibly friendly and greeted us with warm smiles. Especially during the cold winter season, the entire dining experience felt welcoming and wonderful from start to finish.

For our main courses, we ordered the walleye and the steak—both were absolutely delicious! I especially loved the dipping sauce that came with the walleye; the touch of mustard made it stand out for me.

Thank you to every member of the staff. We will definitely be back and bring more friends next time!', 'time': 1765914024, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Marcelo Polanco', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107788908461509917312/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLSTKSl-0QkzKEdtSZ7oqI8_ctiuHVirBxx3kXrvDRyGh29uw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'Swung by right after opening on a Wednesday and the experience right off the bat was excellent. Hostess set the bar high by saying that my server is her favorite server when she eats there and the server Zoe was phenomenal.

Loved seeing the passion and authentic enthusiasm in her face when she spoke of the food; she answered all my questions made me genuinely excited and giddy to eat. The salmon was excellent, perfectly fluffy and moist and the skin was PERFECTLY crispy.

Excellent customer service from all other waitstaff, can’t wait to be back in Madison to eat here again.', 'time': 1763036181, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Benjamin Hammer', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117209078428870872627/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1kKJfTnioOfQkRI6ZNX5oosT0mJAbH6AlFwtcltqPGjr4mH_O=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'Really pleasant dinner at The Harvey House a few weeks ago.  The crudite platter was good BUT the green goddess dip was borderline tasteless.  I’d recommend some salt and more punchy herbs.  The fish entree was spectacular and unlike anything I had ever had, truly a showstopper.  Drinks were well made, and our waiter was so on top of it coming with ice cold glasses halfway through our martinis.  I would definitely recommend and revisit.', 'time': 1763586345, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Brandon Wisneski', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114793517548808420516/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKiRpJnT_aEufwpdDvyuT84oHKnoBghfdRqHzaJBfnpTpQtEw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': "Lively atmosphere, impeccable service, beautiful building, and a creative, elevated take on Wisconsin supper club dishes. Great place for date night, business dinner, or special occasion. Service couldn't have been friendlier from the moment we walked in. Walleye with spatzle and horseradish was the star for me. I admit to being somewhat skeptical of the $18 relish tray, (which is often included in the price of dinner at a traditional supper club), but it was huge and the presentation was stunning. Would definitely return. Free parking onsite. Reservations recommended.", 'time': 1759517522, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Paul Steltenpohl (BP Legend)', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111407905628168061368/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXqFagD1MEvbrfxQy0TDohhy4w4Ym63Tt3R7PBWp47QAfQew=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "Hidden excellence!  Hey call me Old Fashioned, that's the name of a drink, the place offers a quaint atmosphere with a fantastically different menu.  The Walleye was next level.  The kielbasa in a blanket, truly Wisconsin!  And that chocolate cake, as succulent as your first date!", 'time': 1761707574, 'translated': False}]

name: Graze Restaurant
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Mike Udelhoven', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101073634799437966789/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGti8cPSA1dhc4zu0nindi0xGHcGVddakURTgcYdockvpZCKZa=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'in the last week', 'text': 'My fiancé and I were in town for a show, and I had a serious craving for Korean fried chicken. Naturally, we followed our stomachs to Graze Restaurant. Between the glowing reviews and the fact that it’s run by a James Beard Award–winning chef, it felt like the universe was gently but firmly pointing us there.

Our entrance was… concerning. lol An alarm was going off as we walked in. Turns out a water line had broken in the neighboring building. We made the most of it and shimmy danced to the strobe light and alarm.

Once seated, we ordered the Eggs Benedict and the Korean Fried Chicken & Waffle.

The Eggs Benedict came out with a perfectly poached egg, and the addition of a Dijon vinaigrette was something new for me — bright, tangy, and honestly such a great surprise twist.

The Korean Fried Chicken & Waffle was the star of the meal. The chicken was beautifully cooked, crispy outside, juicy inside, and that honey garlic gochujang glaze? Sweet, savory, just enough heat… the kind of flavor that makes you pause mid-bite and look at your partner like, “yoooooo!"

We devoured both dishes and left stuffed and happy. 10/10 recommend this place.', 'time': 1771366097, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Donald K. Barker', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117604754372773055886/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7DGWQEkVH_WQ2JqqrK0hILtVNmlgYjXdr9Lg0g9gr6SIZ_AM=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': 'After finishing the Madison Marathon, we decided to come by for brunch and it was exactly what we needed. The atmosphere was relaxed and welcoming, and the staff took great care of us from the moment we arrived. Once we checked in, we were promptly shown to our table and made comfortable right away. It was a perfect post-race stop with attentive service and a pleasant overall experience.', 'time': 1770199419, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Cooper Vittetoe', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110887805816267140917/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPaaO3PJ4MrsLBvml-QIG8KAG0aH_2MWz8O8v74RXcLxnZTCw-=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': 'Went in for brunch on a Saturday morning. Excellent food and speedy service! An amazing blend of Korean food and brunch! Would highly recommend on a beautiful Madison weekend!', 'time': 1770653680, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Joshua Hartlep', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113535251863729492211/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpnEChMKZfbZx6ZpUYbAwVogOU9U1KDle85eTBqbKZrbvE6uc=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'They were fully booked for brunch so we had to sit at the bar which was fine. The view is amazing in there and overall vibes were great. Obviously pricy but worth it for the experience! I really wanted to try more things on the menu but I went with the loaded hash brown and my girlfriend got the smash burger which was amazing. In the future I’d love to try the Korean dishes and the cheese curds. Also, the bacon egg & cheese egg roll was really unique and it was amazing with the crunch on the outside. Go here!', 'time': 1755630023, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Gaurav Gulati', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111318662923694030728/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXM3quB7Ca88uyxEZzik44ayShWG-ou7n2d8ZOJ5aKngJLJmFxX=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'While visiting Madison, we called in last minute to see if they could accommodate, party of 2, and they were about to get us in at the bar top. served in a hot stone bowl

Graze Burger*: 9.6/10
three-meat patty*: brisket, short rib, and bacon;
caramelized onion-Cabernet jus, Swiss compound butter,
garlic aioli*, sesame duck fat bun
Side Choice: Fries

Basque Cake: 11/10
Kissed by the Sun door county Cherry compote,
sour cream ice cream', 'time': 1758339349, 'translated': False}]

name: Settle Down Tavern
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Sameer Khan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104271517097365110704/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_hQjFFMF8PxnnaoX-vssQAgBIx1vR6vlabc0O7mJFtZpa=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Parents came into town and we wanted to try this place for the first time. The location is right in the heart of downtown near the capitol square. The staff were super friendly, and seated us right away. We had an option to sit “inside” at the bar, or “on the porch” which was more like the center of the building, or outside on the patio. We chose “on the porch” which was the middle of what looked like an old office building with a skylight and tasteful decorations to make you feel like you’re outside without being outside. Was actually kind of cool.

We ordered cheese curds for apps. Honestly, at first I thought the texture was a bit soft/mushie but they really grew on me. The rest of the family agreed. They came out super fast but were still fresh and hot.

Same with the food, our burgers came out like 5 minutes after we ordered. The burger was actually phenomenal, no complaints. Ingredients tasted fresh and there was just the right amount of salt in the meat. Potato bun was nice and fluffy.

The 4 stars comes from the fries. Don’t get me wrong, nothing to complain about the fries themselves. Actually, they were salted, shaped, and crisped exactly like McDonald’s fries. Never seen another restaurant get so close to Macca’s fries, so we’re kind of impressed. But the knocked star: the burger is already $15. Just the burger. And then you pay $5 more just to get fries added on. The burger and fries are good… but $20 good? Nahhh. And it’s on the smaller side too.

Would I recommend this place? Absolutely. I’ll probably end up back at some point myself. Just eat a snack before going and expect to pay $20 for a tummy tickler, and this place is spot on.', 'time': 1760322372, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Susan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106925353520185544265/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXruJvs5MOeJsxTBsKiFqi0ZTq5bdeEXDNHJxOTFJFbSaFTR4s=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': 'The best place to eat/drink in Madison especially if you are a vegetarian/pescatarian. As soon as you walk into the bar, you get the vibe that it’s a funky retro place that really understands craft cocktail and Gastropub food. And those vibes are correct! I had the best falafel burger. So crispy and perfectly spiced. My husband had the fish sandwich. It was crispy, perfectly cooked and has this killer red cabbage coleslaw. The fries as super crispy and come with a great sauce. We went there for lunch. It is soooo good, I am going back for dinner!', 'time': 1770412959, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Lacey Mizell', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117856254804265021095/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOC-qJb-YdYPIF5Q7O-QV6TQ115FsQZa6IZUNI8smAEHkghxpU=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'The way this place stuck with me! name: Eno Vino Downtown
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Peng-Sue Vang', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109180776752072328572/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJWqdX9L_BzxkbXN5AwNG_Mynm1mvBrpX2Y7UdmxW-reZmvyQE=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "Eno Vino offers a stunning atmosphere with panoramic views of the Capital that truly elevate the dining experience.

The ambiance is upscale and perfect for a special night out or a celebratory occasion.
However, when it comes to the food, portions are noticeably small. While the dishes are beautifully presented and flavorful, you’ll likely need to order multiple plates to feel satisfied. This can quickly add up, making the overall value questionable given the price point.

name: Weary Traveler Freehouse
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Brittany Renault', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104505343001216852088/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJAYfoHivcCWgnmZbslwAIiK9lDBg09X_TV-GXXTnsz2M5jWA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': "I have been here many times before and things have been great, especially the food. We came in on an empty night so the atmosphere was nice. The lighting is so beautiful in this restaurant and the music is always great while also having a variety. Our drinks were great! My husband got the black momba and I just had a ginger beer. Since we were one of the only tables you would think we would have gotten our food pretty quickly but it took a while, my husband's ribs were cold. He didn't say anything because he doesn't typically, but then the server was also a bit slow to get us our bill. I know its a relaxed place but there just still wasn't very quick service. I would still go back but just had to be honest.", 'time': 1758857559, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Craig W', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110336980874976649018/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs_O3YsDRNtlnnQBD_gBh21ilwIq6nXb74iFKmgzstUyOBhry5=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "The Weary Traveler Freehouse is just what I expected from a restaurant and bar on Willy Street. A cousin in France read a New York Times (I think) review of Madison's restaurants recently and this was one of two that appealed to me and is within walking distance from home. I arrived at 1 PM on a Friday and found the place about half full. I ordered the Eggs Benny which came with chips, salad, a pickle and wedge of orange. The eggs benny had perfect poached eggs and was easy to cut into bite-sized pieces. I will return. The sound level was quite high, even though the occupancy was around 50% but conversations at a table may not a problem. I was surprised that my cup of coffee was $6 but I was offered a refill twice by a pleasant server. The tin ceiling probably adds to the sound level but is spectacular and worth the loudness of diners.", 'time': 1763848036, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Jonathan W', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101323607714810197076/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0q3idTNmqmq7HLlm0UN21cwC26HBFNts8F0snBMrbaO9Z7Is=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': "Great place to stop, have a bite and a drink. The slider I had was delicious with cream cheese and jalapeños, with the fries being okay, well seasoned but the texture wasn't what I wanted.

The highlight was the great service and cocktails. Quinton (sorry if I butchered the spelling) was a good bartender who made great cocktails. If your weary from your travels check this place out to lift your spirits.", 'time': 1757163034, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Yael Jimenez', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116259077673893754768/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuiZr8eptPOUhsagvvFKaAoAxrupeXVbt2F3SvjdOQB89Hnk4pow=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': "I've been coming here for years as a Madison native. I only had great things to say about this place until the last couple of times I've gone to eat.

The only reason I'm not giving 5 starts is because the last couple times I've gotten the Hungarian goulash it's been mostly broth. I understand the economy is tough but this will only serve to alienate local clientele that has been coming here.

Additionally why did they change giving the vinaigrette on the side in a to go cup? I got home (mind you I live close) and the salad was all soggy.
Go back please!

Honestly I think it's a testament and epitome of if it's not broke don't fix it. This place was perfect 5/5 but with the recent changes I just can't give it perfect.

That being said the OG Bob's bad breath burger is still insanely perfect. Drinks are always 10/10 and the atmosphere is always great. I do miss the bulgogi flatbread but alas I know things got to get switched up so no demerit there.

Moreover, I don't mind the price increase (desert 8$ vs 5$) I get it but I would get it even more if everything was just perfect like I know it could be because it has been for years.

Overall great spot with great staff, food and drinks.
Looking forward to giving the goulash a 3rd and final attempt for redemption 😄", 'time': 1768136728, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'DeeAnn Martin (Dee)', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111659868411874308176/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUhm5eMXW1-brS34Cunwzzeq_gT_6CnuWVGyt_rSIFe96ejQsrAA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Love the atmosphere here... fabulous people and delicious food. Great senses of humor! My friend ordered a beer, and he made it clear, "No frosted glass, no salted rim, no lemon, no salad, just a beer." He got the plain beer - perfectly poured! ... AND a small glass of beer on the side with a sprig of mint on a toothpick! 🤭 After a moment of confusion, we laughed! 🤩🤣 The bartender played a silly, gentle prank on my friend, about the "no salad" comment - hilarious! Fabulous vibe here, highly recommend. 🙋💚💚💚', 'time': 1761140291, 'translated': False}]

reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Rubianto S', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109362277253859708646/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKawYge-5Bzjr2QaflmcE7JvN-MzdlvlR5WfCx7ttM6jRXsvQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'My friend and I were pleasantly surprised by the flavorful food in this restaurant. For the main meal, I asked Patrick, our friendly server, for recommendation, and from there I chose spicy steak sandwich. I loved it.  It was soft, warm and delicious!

name: Lucille
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Essi', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116329353730642684278/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXRzcv3wnXpg-yKa8duXEfdWFVQAlOmCf2Z9PWC2yGh85e1nA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': "After hearing so many great things about Lucille, we were very excited for our first visit. name: Everly
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Al Bunshaft', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111695929896050171851/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFJre8iIYqjWytAdabxB8lzN8Vs_AjAcb1Dx0M9t659alCLoAsdQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Ate dinner here because there were good vegetarian options. That was true and the food was generally good.

We started with the fried artichoke which we found was okay. The sauce provided most of the flavor. I would not order this again.

For mains we had the salmon, the grain bowl and the Pozole Verde. The salmon was very good. The grain bowl  was fine, but it’s mostly cold, not a hot meal, if you care about that. I loved the Pozole Verde. Beware that it’s kinda spicy. I thought it was great but others tasted it and found it too hot.

The service was fine until the end when the server took some of the plates away before everyone was finished which is a complaint of mine. Then she gave us the check, took the credit card and returned bill never clearing the dirty plates while we sat there and chatted. It’s fine to the clear the plates when we’re done.

Food was good and we’d go again. Place was clearing out and server was maybe in a rush.', 'time': 1759854070, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Victoria Murphy', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110877248109535616683/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw956qOel-RshP5O0TL6V_QqtiAu_tqOPwJxhbYQilsJyxdJlv=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "This place was fantastic! They had many clearly labeled vegan options. We went on a Sunday around brunch time and there was an hour long wait, so be mindful of that. This place is popular (for a reason) and relatively small inside. I would make a reservation when possible.

The parking lot is small and shared with out businesses, we got lucky by lurking and got a spot as someone left. But if it's busy, expect street parking and a short walk.

Once we got in we were seated and waited on in a timely way. I got their vegan chorizo breakfast burrito. They were unfortunately out of their house made vegan chorizo but the waitstaff was able to sub in their tofu scramble instead for me. That and my hot chai latte were SO GOOD. The fingerling potatoes are something I'm STILL thinking about.

It's a bit pricey here for me, but absolutely somewhere I'd go back to.", 'time': 1763910213, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Mariah Cunningham', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101344879187772724677/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyKnS-Ke50QFqZRitRH3T-yoDsYNLxMkvAXq-gxqKDoWHA3SOt=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'I’ve been to Everly a few times before and have never had an experience like this, which is why I feel the need to share.
We waited about 40 minutes for our food, and when it arrived it was lukewarm to cold. I ordered the salmon, and it was difficult to cut through. I’ll be attaching photos, but the fish appeared raw in the middle and was cold, while the outside was warmer.
I asked the waitress whether the salmon was raw or cooked a certain way, and I was told it was cooked medium. Trusting that, I finished the meal and went on with my night.
However, once I got home, I was violently throwing up for hours. I had eaten multiple things that day, and the only food I became sick after was the salmon.
It’s been about 18 hours since I’ve eaten the Salmon and I am still violently vomiting, shaking, and my stomach has been cramping. I was told to go to urgent care but I’m holding off.
I’m very disappointed, especially because I’ve had good experiences here in the past. Serving fish that is undercooked and not properly heated is a serious food safety concern, and I hope this is addressed so it doesn’t happen to someone else.', 'time': 1765741723, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Faith F', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101807808943154388706/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXAFzm20OVnOrp7_mq8LaTrwdGIKHzsficZzSOM71PLCtPUHhgSQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '8 months ago', 'text': 'This is a very cute restaurant with great food. We started with some good cheese curds, which were a promising start. Isabelle was our server and she explained some items on the menu, which I had questions about.  For my main, I decided on the pork belly mac and cheese (without blue cheese) after much deliberation. Sadly, after a rather long wait, the dish was a major letdown. It was surprisingly bland, and even the three pork cubes on top lacked any flavor. Despite being very hungry, I couldn\'t bring myself to finish it. It\'s a shame when expectations don\'t meet reality. I explained to Isabelle when she noticed that I wasn\'t eating my food that I was dissatisfied,  before walking away, she shrugged and said, "Well, it\'s mac and cheese."', 'time': 1753316317, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'heather pisano', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110280525512917225651/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmBQJTheRgtst0jZKoI-k0vrONUYiUTcbhBxQ7vDcpQoBIaEY_Hw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Cute rustic restaurant with unique eats (ie a beet and goat cheese sandwich). Delicious cheese curds and fresh salads!', 'time': 1756761958, 'translated': False}]

name: Mint Mark
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Michael A.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113102362926511717501/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk9iKrt_EaK0LSyjYzkcLAecZ4ztsxmw63_xNWzkSOANpncQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': 'I had been waiting to try Mint Mark for quite some time and had not gotten around to it , until Early in January after the holiday season  decided to make a reservation and try them out .

First and foremost: reservations are highly recommended as they seem to book up very quickly especially over the weekends . Parking was very easy and straightforward inside an enclosed garage which was perfect for winter .

We arrived few minutes earlier and our table was not yet ready so we wondered into the adjacent specialty store and browsed the numerous products and vast array of unique alcohol selection for sale . Cool store.

When we were called for our table our server greeted us and explained the concept of the restaurant. Small plates that come out as the food is prepared . Awesome ! Love the sharing small plate concept when eating out as it allows me to try multiple flavors .

She was extra kind to personally annotate and mark up the menu for us indicating what items were gluten free and what could be modified and what were cross . Greatly appreciated this as it added ease for ordering . Thank you !

And so it began! Cocktails are great . From classics to specialties . We ordered seven different small plates to share and each was delicious in its own way .

Fig & olive spread sets the right tone. Spread on warm toasted bread (not gf) was great. Preserved beets with crème fresh are extra special with a nice pickled aftertaste: what a winner. Cauliflower came recommended from our server and it was excellent. A little salty , semi sweet raisins and crispy cheese . All flavors on the table so far balance and compliment each other well.

Potato sausage Bavarian style with braised red cabbage was a hit. Not on the menu but made for gf was a risotto with sausage . So decadent rich and flavor it could possibly be a staple on this menu . Creamy and warm on a cold night. Finally the steak and frites are a perfectly prepared with an aioli and sauce that brings all flavors together.

More cocktails and all the food on the table makes sense. A delicious dinner with so may flavor profiles . Finally for desert we tried the crème brûlée with a different style burnt sugar on the top . Crème was good but the topping for me was not my favorite .

A great memorable meal and will definitely be back . Many thanks to the staff who added to the experience.', 'time': 1770491064, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'J S', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111353964966756274454/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTa-azyJbbmvhmAKpPUrZBGe-48-5E4z-gYgdrqxx4rujUJJl-=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'Signature drink is amazing! Atmosphere is great! Kitchen looks very clean! Bar looks very well organized! One of my favorite place to go have some drinks! However, the food really isn’t that tasty. The presentation is great.', 'time': 1762469450, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Laurie Prince', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115631761506136819647/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhXE-rh5KUDfIbcvTnxteH5KWpklUB9sXSZ1JsEsMWjY8wYg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "Very busy venue with regulars. Might have to wait for table.

Bar service was quick. Easier for friend and I to order drinks and apps.

Unless you're a foodie, we found the menu to have many different/unusual types of foods. Presentation was lovely, though. Customers and staff friendly. Validated parking a bonus!", 'time': 1762878251, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Steps', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101570056678917263834/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwhhuDROyA2oRskkyvFLdHPjylA62LEalcltcJXd3Hv7Xhmw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'They have a great bar area and craft drinks.  It looks like they make all their own mixers for drinks.  Service was great.  I am personally not a fan of the look and feel of the restaurant.  It does seem a bit loud with the open kitchen and ceilings.', 'time': 1768923195, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Jennifer Stark', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113933250430131490143/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWg2zkilLp_tzz_Dxdz5F8tGhkR2oFfqErRY_PWpyvkk6BMaRGr6Q=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Mint Mark is hands down the best brunch in Madison, Wisconsin.

The menu doesn’t do justice to what is beautifully presented by the friendly and knowledgeable staff. Mint Mark is known for their shared plates, and while I usually save sharing for dinner, trust me—a shared breakfast here is what it’s all about. You get to experience so many flavorful, fun dishes all at once. It feels like Christmas on a table.

Parnassus was our server, and she greeted us with a vibrant smile that instantly set the tone for a fun and exciting brunch. She walked us through each dish in detail, making the experience feel special and thoughtful. Our drinks were always full, and she checked in frequently to make sure everything was perfect.

If you’re dining at Mint Mark, be sure to ask for Parnassus. She’ll be heading to NYC in Spring 2026 to chase her Broadway dreams—send her all the good vibes and wish her the best of luck.

Thank you to the incredible chefs, bartenders, Parnassus, and the entire Mint Mark team for making our brunch so memorable. We’ll definitely be back!', 'time': 1765669114, 'translated': False}]

name: The Statehouse
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Somni Moten', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104014989536622326981/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-ce89tDyG_aBX9QSZBtGWWJz4TjFbuc5R1UtHx5_IH5HSIFgK=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'I went here for Thanksgiving dinner, and it was spectacular. The calamari had a light batter, not overly thick breading. The Shirley Temple had a grenadine I had never tasted before, but it was not bad. The bread pudding was a little too thick compared to the cream ratio, but it was still excellent. This was my first time trying beef wellington, and it was phenomenal. The steak was cooked perfectly, and they let me substitute the normal sides for the Thanksgiving sides. The stuffing was amazing, as were the brussels sprouts.', 'time': 1766955211, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Mimi', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105542969490155756911/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdilJ_IMarOkANgr9RWCKChXS0r1-xgUnghEuZjiPHgw6jQH8p=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': 'I came here for the first time to celebrate a special occasion and left extremely disappointed.

Despite having a reservation, we had to wait about 15 minutes to be seated. The staff blamed it on others customers “camping out,” even though there were many empty tables when we were seated and the restaurant kept getting emptier throughout the night. It felt like a lack of accountability.

Service was slow and inattentive. It took a long time for anyone to take our drink and food order, water was never refilled, had to ask for it, and no one checked in until on our entree until we were almost done eating.

I ordered the $63 beef Wellington, which was the biggest letdown. Although it may look slightly pink in photos, it was not medium rare. It was fully cooked through, dry, and very chewy, similar to braised beef that has turned pink but is overcooked. The pastry was mushy and soggy. This is unacceptable at this price point.

The server also placed the dishes in front of the wrong person without asking, even though there were only two of us. When I asked about the doneness, I was told it is supposed to be medium rare, but then the issue was blamed on a large private party they had that night. They offered to remake it, which would have taken another 40 minutes, or a free dessert. A $13 dessert does not make up for a $63 failed entrée.

This was a special occasion, and the experience fell far short. I will not be returning 100%', 'time': 1770604490, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Adam', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101569543190355770725/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6I4j5xF-6kxa5hUn7KI_Z5r2L5Kaz5rFwfojPVIXbxlr4r7-H=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'We had dinner at The Statehouse in Madison with our family. It’s a beautiful setting with a great view, and most of the food was excellent. However, we had a reservation and still waited over 40 minutes for a table, which was tough with kids. My beef Wellington was almost too chewy to eat, and when I mentioned it to our server, nothing was done. Overall, a nice place but the experience left me on the fence about coming back.', 'time': 1762194085, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Robert Lemons', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106134740200954014838/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqL-atE530vhuacx-03Yq_3-ipGNL8EXUCpZZgI5IN9XrzzIde=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '10 months ago', 'text': 'The Statehouse was great!  I will say the atmosphere is a tad on the upscale side and I was definitely not dressed for the occasion.  No worries though, I was still able to sit down and enjoy a great meal.  I stated off with the Chicken Wings in the traditional buffalo sauce followed up with the Roasted Salmon.  Yes, the salmon is half eaten, sometimes I just dig in before I remember to snap a few photos but the wings and salmon were good.  The risotto was OK.  I haven’t had much risotto and I’m beginning to think I’m not mush of a fan.  I finished up my meal with the Autumn Cheesecake and I was expecting a little more from this dessert than I got.  I guess I kept expecting pumpkin cheese cake due to the color but it’s definitely a much or mild and softer cheesecake than what I was expecting.  Overall, I enjoyed The Statehouse and my meal.', 'time': 1743637645, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Weary Traveler', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115836600352353456413/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZWnf9r9b5_xZq5hF5Fu5za6hItd3b9wDtFLl0488Oo1NrhLBxkA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '7 months ago', 'text': 'Celebrated my 1 year anniversary here. Very good food with excellent service. I highly recommend the butter board. I got the beef wellington and my wife got the fillet. We will be back again.', 'time': 1751246147, 'translated': False}]

name: L'Etoile Restaurant
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'peter', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115415592390959881264/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiSHeQOMfVD44-ZyYBsVdShaoilPZSnQJ8f-XFjx7vNVtesPw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Wine pairing was nice, food was tasty, atmosphere was decadent, view is iconic, price is non negotiable, table cloths are white, coat check is free, staff is full of smiles', 'time': 1765331538, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Alina Pumarada', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104835979615000837454/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwi6eSM834iHADKjcPd4ytqwJnyVeB_d6xqd8U3OQYELz5qGZA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': "We came in for Spanish Tapas Night and we were blown away. We love this restaurant for many reasons and the food, as always, was spectacular! The service from beginning to end was amazing but Payton and Brandon were exceptional! The hostess always has a big smile on her face! Eveyone that attended us was smiling and explaining all the dishes which was great. They go above and beyond. You won't be disappointed. Absolutely loved this experience! Highly recommend!", 'time': 1765419455, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Sarah', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114272202896119227518/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK1HnBtUHteolPXGmkltCuyTkg_x5NZDv59eYReQUMKMTcRwdw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': "This was not my first time at L'Etoile, as we've been several times since moving to Madison about a year and a half ago. I have been meaning to leave a review! We typically opt for the tasting menu with the wine pairing, and it never disappoints. The ambiance is exceptional, with a stunning view of Madison’s Capitol building.

One of the highlights is the sommelier—he is an incredible storyteller and takes the time to answer any questions we have about the wines. The waitstaff is always professional and attentive, adding to the overall experience.

We’re already looking forward to our next visit at the end of the month!

Here are a few photos from our most recent meal.", 'time': 1738622301, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Edward Alan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108675044755462381469/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2GFN_lMm0VDJ2SeJYSCihwnhguJJbq9oj_2TOKWkBT4iZSeUp=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'A Birthday at L’Etoile – Madison’s Star Still Shines Bright

For my birthday this year, my family and I returned to L’Etoile, Madison’s temple of seasonal Midwestern fine dining, and once again it delivered an evening as precise and memorable as any I’ve experienced. From the moment we were greeted with a warm “Happy Birthday, Edward” printed at the top of the tasting menu, it was clear that the team’s attention to detail would extend far beyond the plate.

The service was exemplary—timed to the rhythm of the meal, neither rushed nor lingering. Each course arrived as a perfectly staged moment, the presentation so artful that pausing to admire it felt almost obligatory. I had chosen the grand tasting menu, enhanced by the sommelier’s wine pairings—an indulgence that proved more than worth the additional charge. His selections didn’t just complement the dishes; they deepened them, drawing out flavors I might otherwise have missed.

The Hamachi Crudo en Adobo set the tone—delicate slices of fish accented with sweet corn, creamy avocado, blue corn tostadas for crunch, and a blueberry pico de gallo that provided a surprising pop of tart sweetness.

Next came Ricotta Agnolotti, a dish that balanced rustic warmth with garden freshness. Nestled among ratatouille, capers, and a tender squash blossom, the agnolotti’s creamy filling was lifted by basil’s perfume.

The Boquerones-Crusted Alaskan Halibut was a study in finesse—its golden crust giving way to tender, flaky fish. It was anchored by dashi-braised leeks and potatoes à la Robuchon (silken, butter-rich, and dangerously addictive), with chanterelles and haricots verts adding earth and green snap.

Then, the Pinn-Oak Ridge Lamb Spare Rib Shawarma—aromatic, tender, and served with fava bean falafel, cucumber yogurt, and a sumac-scented onion salad that cut through the lamb’s richness beautifully.

The New York Strip Ribeye course was a carnivore’s finale—perfectly seared, accompanied by smoky Spanish octopus, crispy patatas bravas, and the brightness of sungold tomatoes.

Dessert was a playful yet refined Door County Sweet Cherry Fool—a summer tableau of sweet corn budino, brown sugar corn cake, Thai basil shortbread, and a lace of caramel.

As we left, my family and I agreed: L’Etoile remains unmatched in its ability to make a meal feel like an occasion. It’s not simply about the food, but the way every element—service, pacing, wine, and presentation—converges into an experience greater than the sum of its parts. Next year’s birthday already has a reservation in spirit.', 'time': 1755016606, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Rancorous', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111578845757233642955/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhcg8XYrbPclpuHPtWMj9E8zp0NMiaA2Ksbqn70wqS-xYjf5k=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '10 months ago', 'text': "Everything was very good. It's definitely a fine dining atmosphere. Everything from the music to the service was excellent. The food tasted extremely fresh. I opted for the ala cart. You can order as many dishes as you want.", 'time': 1745678759, 'translated': False}]

name: The Audrey Kitchen + Bar
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Megan DeTray', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100567781165908369625/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlWvfIgpHjX_Nzfk2N0-GoUQxUFQ18PBV65h0_9t8AqL6uiw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'I was promptly greeted by the host, and the server Chas was attentive and helpful! Garden pasta was yummy, maybe the noodles a bit overcooked but that did not ruin it for me at all. I love the pesto, and the squash was perfectly cooked crisp-tender. I also had an Asian Pear Martini, which was unique and tasty. I would return here if I come stay at the Hilton again!', 'time': 1761177055, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'LostBoy', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116865776888025255718/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItpkBCwzoAeoVY2gk6r9itGQztcIYY64TM-iEyloP63fZUfg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': "1 bartender + 1 waiter + 1 host = 1 very, very, very slow New Year's Eve dinner

I should have read reviews before making our reservation.  I have been there before, but things have gone downhill.  I agree with the other reviews that the Hilton needs to take a look at this restaurant.

I will give the atmosphere a good mark.  It is cozy and quiet, which is what I wanted.  And despite waiting between 20-45 minutes for a round of cocktails for a party of 3, the Pear Martini was delicious.

But that isn't enough to get us to go back or to recommend to others.", 'time': 1767380772, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Michael A.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113102362926511717501/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk9iKrt_EaK0LSyjYzkcLAecZ4ztsxmw63_xNWzkSOANpncQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'I was attending an event in downtown Madison and despite the plethora of great food options around town , our group wanted to stay in the hotel for dinner after having  drinks at the bar .

I was expecting better from the food especially as I have eaten at numerous Hilton restaurants around the country.

The restaurant is called Audrey Kitchen and it is adjacent to the bar . Bar and bartender by the way was fun and good drinks !

I chose what I thought was a cold salad bowl and added a seared Salmon as an extra topping. The grain bowl consisted of quinoa , sweet potatoes and a spiced version chickpeas that was warm (or warmed up) and a bit of a “blob” . Salmon was okay but definitely well overcooked.

I have to give kudos to the great service as the waitress was very nice and helpful.

Overall fairly mediocre experience when it comes to the food.', 'time': 1735065202, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Kate Yentes', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112203085187363875303/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlxVq6jZmajjCFT9S-qTNVyKbvMxO4OJUU9ZgjCaxVV7Obp-Nd=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "I had the peach chicken and it was delicious. The glaze wasn't overpowering, the rose was amazing, the potatoes and green beans were the perfect side to pair with the chicken. The music was low and relaxing and the decor was beautiful. Doordash had a wait of an hour to get food and I am glad they did. This meal was perfect after a day of driving.", 'time': 1761526421, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Farah Ali', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108518015789450822559/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV52IsbQzP454ZUHLPynQ7VZdjdk32QqEHpxFsgzYfi4v3PmSyd=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 years ago', 'text': 'Loved the food, decor, and ambience of
this place. It’s very new and fresh and well put together Didn’t know it was a hotel restaurant till we got there. Located inside the Hilton Hotel, this place is amazing. I recommend checking this place out for tasty appetizers, pizzas, drinks and awesome services

Must must try the Popcorn Shrimp, Fried Pickles  and Wisconsin Cheese Curds. The pizzas were really good and so was the chicken sandwich.   The service was excellent and we enjoyed our late night dinner there.', 'time': 1634064692, 'translated': False}]

name: Sardine
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Hanna Ramos', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100609855452337707177/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfL-baGXAi4HCDYxJCSKwhxH7TevNdVJctGmwLmwfpnqGXghPbjA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Sardine was absolutely perfect.  We went on a busy Sunday morning- and we had made no reservations!  It was bustling inside.  We got seated immediately at a communal table with the warning that the communal table turns into a reserved table at a certain time.  They also promised that if we were still there when that happened they would move us.  When that time approached the waitstaff smoothly moved us and our stuff to a neighboring two top.
The food!!!  Having worked in a high end patisserie in NYC we had some pretty high standards and Sardine was exceptional.  I felt transported back to NYC and Paris.
The marshmallow on the hot chocolate was incredible.  The oysters were absolutely delicious and sweet.  Our Croque Madams were exactly what we were missing.  Everything was perfect.', 'time': 1764074938, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Robert Robertson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116283271258635194861/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUW9ADi3Ssp-OdByp9c5tTgIUNq-ZqLG8SxXySuGQpcQOQQyCs=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': "The food was a bit expensive... but I didn't get the check, however the atmosphere was really nice... PLUS the service was beyond exceptional, superb. Great place for a treat! Reservation recommended!", 'time': 1770507269, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Adreana Tee', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102818751669648395199/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVyM-piEwvQVTuw1PAI9Pp0U_4AXtmpEU0kojc5v0lO4LTYJyj=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': "This spot holds a very special place in my heart. It's not often that I get to visit but when I do I thoroughly enjoy the service and food quality and taste.  The oysters are a must.  You can do a mix and match set so as to try all that they offer. Out server was very kind and even offered a free sorbet on my birthday.  The sorbet was sooo flavourful and had a little candied lemon on top.  Top notch dessert.  Now to circle back to dinner.   My ribeye served rare was delectable. I went with a salad on the side instead of fries. My only complaint was that the aioli wasn't very garlicky and could've used some more flavor. I can't wait to take my boyfriend here.

Overall.  Exquisite.", 'time': 1765746989, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Marianne Ha', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106193975161230894626/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIB3dcHOvEPfcKKxuOga4T_DRRqPoGGDnL65XtsbHnxXMdt8A=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Fabulous experience at Sardine - almost everything tasted fresh and well-executed. House salad and pork chop were excellent. We also had the duck dish; I thought the mashed potatoes were a tad too salty and duck would have fared better if less cooked (perhaps a medium rare rather than medium). Extensive drinks list and attentive service too. Overall, a wonderful time and possibly the best restaurant in Madison!', 'time': 1758643172, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Riley Meyers', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106335041375803818099/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9i0peXZkFEJmkCTH3lnGNIR58vTpmMsxsj9vKGAdV2Sfzosmy=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '7 months ago', 'text': 'Went here for our anniversary and had an incredible time! The food was delicious, we started with the appetizer special and were blown away. Had the Madison sourdough bread as an app as well and we ate the entire basket!
The whitefish and steak were amazing, both very soft and flavorful. Will definitely be back.', 'time': 1753039579, 'translated': False}]

name: Draper Brothers Chophouse
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Alex Graber', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111514375211761714724/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJtbKRGAgXmeEBzBwIxpxxGK7sRpqBA_mhM-nzCDgGpbMm1Kg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Potentially found my new favorite drink, a New York Sour! So good! People were asking us about it.

The restaurant was packed for New Year’s Eve as expected. Staff were very busy and working hard to accommodate everyone. We certainly understood that they were a bit behind on reservations and appreciated their transparency about this to set expectations. The bar and those gathering became overcrowded and somewhat interfered with tables in the bar area. We ended up being seated at a small table in the corner of the bar against a cold window on a very windy night. Not the end of the world, but not an ideal space.

Our server was so friendly, but you could tell was overworked. She had most if not all of the tables in the bar area. She was moving constantly, and her ability to check on us more often and be attentive was not possible.

The star of the show was definitely the house mashed potatoes. If you are a rosemary lover, don’t think twice! My filet had good flavor, but was not cooked evenly. About half of the steak was medium well. The other half was closer to medium, but that is being generous. Overcooked for sure. The server was incredibly apologetic and offered to provide us with a free dessert.

Three all gender bathrooms for this restaurant is not enough on a busy night. The wait was significantly more than I expected. They were very clean and luxurious!

I would return again, but would most likely consider dinner at the bar or a different table upstairs.', 'time': 1767389841, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Aisha Bachlani', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105295753226656232377/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3QGlQHgI74jBZc-bQw51NjwwE8Rni_dOduAKiYKqMar7qsYjJBQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'If you haven’t had a chance to dine at Draper Brothers Chophouse, do yourself a favor and make a reservation ASAP! It’s evident that their ownership and staff have spared no details: from a thoughtfully curated menu to attentive service and an intimate ambiance, this is one of the most flawless dining experiences I have had in a while.

The wine list is one of the most impressive I have seen – whether you’re hosting a group or winding down the day solo, there is something for everyone. I’m very particular about the steakhouses I frequent, and I will 100% be a regular customer.

If you’re in the Madison area (or even visiting), be sure to put Draper Brothers on your list – you will not be disappointed!', 'time': 1764111326, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Tenzin Palden', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100174743137797451042/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjaHk-A77_SVovuR8hj4OFfM7MQLCH1D9QheKKG1JajQ-VuA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'We showed up with no reservation and was offered bar seating. It was still just as nice and had excellent service from the bartender. We ordered the chicken and ravioli. They were both delicious!  If you want something big and filling the chicken was more than enough and if you’re feeling something a little smaller and lighter the ravioli is great. Overall, a great dinner spot but just make sure to call to get a reservation or see if they have seating available.', 'time': 1756004281, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Dee Biznatch', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107030526525530592457/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyTqRq1YB3wxjAa12Wb6IqUc76uNNK5hrDnsKuNIUtHc4_ucz1Tg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Had an incredible experience on a random Tuesday night. The chef even checked to see if we enjoyed our meals and we definitely did. The steak tartare and olive oil lemon cake were so good we almost cried. Beef mushroom ravioli and chicken parm were 🤌Cocktails were mixed with great care - highly recommend the Italian margarita. Server was very sweet and attentive but not hovering. Just magical with the snow coming down and wonderful ambience. Thanks to the staff for a fantastic time.', 'time': 1765370613, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'a bomb', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116202753981312228276/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXz6IKJjADpXX9J3YvhX1GEDzptETR8OfQ58jK4IUFYfPbnnHbr=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': "I wish I could give this place 0 stars. Reservation at 8:30. Sat after 9:30. Given it new years but what are reservation even for?
Management tried to ignore us, standing in the kitchen for an hour cause this place is small. Maybe this is the standard around these parts but unacceptable in my mind. Do better. Madison is a tough place to survive in the restaurant biz and I cant image this one star will help. Never coming back no matter how good the food is. Doesn't matter how many bottles of wine or gift card you throw at me. This was an all around F-. Servers have been great. Im still waiting on my food and its 10:45. 11:05 I left. Heritage house is a nice pub. Go there instead.  This place sorely need better management", 'time': 1767702121, 'translated': False}]

name: Pink Flamingo Brunch Cafe
reviews: [{'author_name': 'Tambra Riddle', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113368381372696481953/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5pYk2z255RT7_g7epTcwjDiWuX5TdCIxrX1bxdzTZSrNefm7tww=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'I was so happy to discover this new place! It used to be Sunroom Cafe, an iconic, busy, sunny little place above State Street, and then got sold during Covid and went downhill. Pink Flamingo has now been here for a couple months and my husband and I went today. I didn’t know what to expect since I still miss Sunroom Cafe so much. But instantly upon opening the door, I could tell it was going to be great. We are both vegan and the menu offers vegan eggs as a substitute to several dishes. I ordered a caramel latte with almond milk (good!) and the Squash Bowl, sub vegan eggs with no sour cream and added avocado. It was SO GOOD! Everything was cooked perfectly, the quinoa was tender and not mushy, a nice proportion of veggies to eggs and potatoes, the avocado was fresh and delicious. It felt great to be here today, sitting next to the window, enjoying the atmosphere… it’s got a great vibe. I also got to meet the owners, they were so sweet and friendly, we chatted for a bit and I can tell they really care about the customers and making a fun dining experience. They even painted the hallways and did a nice job remodeling the bathroom, keeping with the flamingo theme. How fun and cute this place was, I appreciated the vegan accommodations as well. They also seemed open to my suggestion of keeping vegan cheese on hand (easy to keep fresh by freezing and use per request) and I also found out they have vegan chocolate cake! Even tho, as a vegan for over 30 years, I would appreciate the addition of a local vegan pastry or two, I would definitely recommend this place and plan on visiting again and again! It’s sad that Sunroom closed, but I hope this place becomes an iconic part of Madison again; it seems like they have what it takes! Very caring friendly staff as well, making you feel welcomed and that speaks volumes!', 'time': 1759698352, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Vaidehi Patil', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115229243841051748612/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9pP-Q9nZVF-PGSHxnfKU5bVOlWxiquUDWtXJEYX3RCsLRww=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'The food really was excellent (we both got the Chilaquiles with birria) but what really stood out was the customer service. I accidentally knocked over my hot chocolate drink and got it all over myself and the floor. Jaime (I really hope I’m not butchering his name) was incredibly kind. Him and some other staff immediately came over with towels and were super nice about it. He even replaced my drink for free even though it was entirely my own fault for knocking it over. I really appreciated how kind he was and extremely prompt with taking care of us as well!', 'time': 1765741643, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Bruce Mayer', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111442174100126670002/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKWB5wHktXaFPQWMqKKYe4VVM9jmXzFPyJZz6Eye9OpjVYhew=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Great new cafe on State Street. Food was excellent.  Creative dishes nicely presented. And an extensive drink and coffee menu. Lots on NA and no caffeine options. Vegan and GF friendly.\nHad a Strawberry Matcha Latte that was amazing. Also we had Chiva which  is a coffee latte drink with goat milk. Entree was the Pail in the Sand. A crab cake sandwich with onion straws and choice of fries or salad. name: The Boathouse
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Stacy Matousek', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109180842465999034296/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9D3YyJpTkNqCBmEWDX3S-Kl3Jixq6d4VOLLwl7Zpu6CNZAkCAKA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'This was a cool place we found. We only had an appetizer and a soda . The cheese curds were awesome. Our service was ehh, They werent real busy when we arrived but it seemed like our server could never be found. He never brought our dipping sauce and we couldnt tell him because he couldnt be found. When he finally came back we were about done eating so we just said forget it. Im sure its a great place in the summer being on the water and all.', 'time': 1768137644, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'MKB', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/118067365178890644688/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2W-KVZbmkrO2uStXpphjy_VC47afo2u3kxED6Jc5SRBbmYdwF9w=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': "What a view!

We had lunch there on a Wednesday afternoon.

We parked a little over a block away.  Free street parking.  I could see if it was busy parking could be a problem.  As far as I know I don't' think the restaurant offers parking?

The restaurant is located in a hotel, on the bottom two floors.  The first floor was closed.  The lower floor has a small bar area with an outdoor terrace right on Lake Mendota.

There were one or two open tables but the receptionist said either they were holding them for reservations or something about the waitress was slammed earlier and taking a break?  She said we could wait 15 min or take a table in the bar area.  It was such a nice weather day that we decided to wait.  In less than 10 minutes she ended up giving us one of the tables that was originally open.

My wife had a Blue Moon beer which she said was super cold and very good.

We ordered some chips and salsa and enjoyed the excellent view.

There were about 2 or 3 birds which took an interest in our chips and were annoying, but what do you expect being outside.

The chips and salsa were ok.  They advertised the chips were made in-house.  I thought they needed more salt and could be a bit crisper.  I enjoyed that the salsa was pureed, but we both agreed it was a bit bland.

My wife had the shrimp roll with chips.  I had the cheeseburger with up- charged $2 fries.

She said her sandwich was good but could use less cucumbers and more shrimp but would get it again.

I ordered my cheeseburger plain with just cheese.  It was done medium which I prefer. The patty was thicker than normal but a bit smaller than the bun.
It appeared they attempted to toast the bun but it was not crisp.  It was ok but would try something different next time.  The fries were a bit underdone and semi warm.  Would not get them again.

I would go back again to enjoy the outstanding view.", 'time': 1756572931, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Vikram Bala', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/118263460813448768909/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAuKPVKQIpv-7RzfteWfuE5DFV1gf-TGuFuvANkazzlq4nzbZ6Qg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '8 months ago', 'text': "The atmosphere is absolutely phenomenal! If you get an outdoor seat 🪑, you are literally right on the lake and have spectacular views! The cheese 🧀 curds were mouth-watering 👄. MY OH MY, I could eat those every single day!! That being said, my sandwich 🥪 wasn't great. Seems like you gotta order the right item from the menu. Either way, it's definitely worth a visit, even if it's just for a peaceful, scenic dinner 🍽️ on the lake.", 'time': 1750381370, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'B. Perna', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108594294679126409375/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJF9RmN_t80iuO4pMg8O9p9Ned7iIL9Ib9BPyXOq62wNqYDk0cf=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '10 months ago', 'text': "Our recent lunch at the Boathouse Restaurant was a truly enjoyable experience, easily earning a solid four-star rating. The highlights were the delicious and fresh seafood. Every bite tasted like it had just come from the water, a testament to their sourcing and preparation.
Adding to the culinary delight were the excellent views from the patio. Dining with such a picturesque waterfront backdrop truly elevated the entire meal. It's the perfect spot to relax and soak in the atmosphere while savoring your food.
Finally, the fast service was a welcome surprise. Our server was attentive and efficient, ensuring we had everything we needed without feeling rushed. This made for a seamless and pleasant dining experience.
For a delicious and fresh seafood lunch with great views and prompt service, the Boathouse Restaurant is an excellent choice and highly recommended.", 'time': 1744547345, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Whole', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108906445703972643307/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXo-a61HFEhXUEbw4U8rpLbIHS5Mf8JWGx7SSMqbkUvD8AxKSY=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '8 months ago', 'text': 'Easily one of my favorite spots of my entire trip to Madison! It was beautiful, you can sit directly on the water and enjoy the views as well as walk out on the dock and get a taste of the breeze.

The server was wonderful, extremely kind and helpful. The Wisco burger was delicious, I devoured it quickly, the bacon jam was drippy but complimented the cheese well. All of my group members enjoyed their dishes.

You have to walk down quite a bit of stairs to reach this restaurant. Bathrooms are located right outside the restaurant when you enter, they are very clean.', 'time': 1750112829, 'translated': False}]

reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Sokjita Hout', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107772421524500487545/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWVXw40blbv6ISRi_XvL8t5_mPJZswHyMUAyR8XLefI_bT9WgIUw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "Alchemy Cafe is a must-visit! The food was absolutely delicious, and the prices were spot on. The sweet potato fries and wasabi green beans were standouts - highly recommend trying them! The atmosphere of the cafe is great, making it a wonderful spot to relax and enjoy a meal. It's definitely worth visiting while in town, and honestly, the restaurant alone would be a great reason to come back to Wisconsin.
