While in Madison , our fixers were saying they have heard great things about the food, so we stopped  by. Great sweet potatoes fries.
Others in our party had custom cocktails.  Thanks to the staff for a memorable  lunch.', 'time': 1766454521, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Emily', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107725187462804326438/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQKrvkjhQzJ5vJW_p_3DkE2Y__MZNwIBLsAI3oORjHRjoTGml2=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'The food here was incredible! We got the stuffed grilled cheese with the veggie soup and the coconut curry. Both were full of flavor and perfect for a chilly evening. Our server Erica was friendly and helpful. We would have completely forgotten to get a slice of the coconut tres leches cake had she not asked. Our only regret was not getting two slices, but we shared well.
The loud atmosphere with the experimental noise music was unexpected for such a seemingly chill environment, otherwise we’re so glad we had dinner here.', 'time': 1754420441, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Sheri Mazariegos', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116137378980185648530/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVP7H7PqqjbKrVFFnd3BHOZMTrQHbytALTjIrD0TBgTSvhBVB7-OA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '7 months ago', 'text': 'We were in Madison for the day only for work and wanted to try a local place - Alchemy not only fit the bill for local, helped us discover a new funky area away from the capitol building worth visiting, and we had a delicious lunch. Put this on your must visit list!

We had read the reviews so had an idea of what to order, but we had the sweetest waitress and she was really helpful as well. Service was very quick, incredibly attentive. Food came very quickly. I took the interior photos at the end of our meal and after the lunch crowd had left, but it was packed when we first sat down.

Boho vibe, lots of seating indoors and outside blocked off patio, and a bar area that looked like it could be fun at night.

We ordered the sweet potato fries to start. Neither my husband nor I are big sweet potato fans, so we were completely blown away by how tasty these were and how much the flavor was enhanced by dipping them into the blackberry jam - we would go back for this combo alone! Do yourself a favor and make sure you try these! Both of the side sauces are delicious:) For our main meal, we had the Maíz salad, tomato bisque and The House Boat grilled chicken sandwich. Everything was incredibly fresh and packed with unique flavors. Just a head’s up, the Maíz salad has a red pepper kick, for those of us that are wimps when it comes to spicy food - it will make your nose run! The tomato bisque was as good as any I’ve had anywhere… delicious and well priced! My husband enjoyed the grilled chicken sandwich and ordered the deviled egg potato salad as his side, which was a good combo and as well packed with flavor! We are definitely looking forward to returning to try some other things that looked fantastic on the menu. We ended up taking home enough leftovers that we had a full meal for the next day.

It is street parking and that can be a little bit tricky, but totally worth having to circle once or twice. This place has a casual, boho vibe with a creative menu. We definitely will be returning!', 'time': 1751644864, 'translated': False}]

name: Ático Lounge - Madison
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Victoria Repp', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106517818198381030585/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8amOBV1G5IgPtiVcwMC4basAEn1HVjDPUCRklnE3P_5CIVq4Q7w=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'We had such a fun experience at Ático Lounge! We started with drinks at the bar, which is absolutely adorable. The bar staff was incredibly attentive and helpful, and honestly the drink menu alone is a reason to visit — tons of tequila options and really unique cocktails. We especially loved the flaming piña coladas!

We had a reservation for Saturday night, but I don’t think it was necessary. It wasn’t overly busy, though I would recommend they add more signage inside the hotel — it took us a minute to figure out where to go. (Tip: it’s on the rooftop of the Moxy Hotel; just head to the top floor.)

All of the food we ordered was excellent. Service was a little slow, but we were dining with friends and didn’t mind the pace at all. One member of our group was gluten-free and the restaurant handled it just fine — we just had to double-check a couple of items since our server was a bit confused when delivering dishes, but she was happy to make sure everything was safe.

Highlights were the ceviche trio, the skewers, and their amazing mole. We ordered a LOT and couldn’t finish everything.

We visited in winter, so the outdoor patio wasn’t open, but it looks like it would be such a fun spot in the summer. Between the rooftop vibes, great food, and fantastic cocktails, this is definitely a place worth returning to!', 'time': 1764515511, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Teodora Paun', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/103283344258882747586/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7sUWPevnt55OZEDvisqHaSl3s-UGQyJVkhNxMIXIrJuazekI=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Very professional service.

Everything was fresh and delicious, can’t wait to go back for more…', 'time': 1762990755, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Zu Ekpunobi (Dr. Zu)', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110682854831241126532/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYaVS7sapyZiJ8nMvqeEKPSURir-w42qtX66kMGhv2XUDAzqL9og=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "Disappointing and strange flavors. name: Naples 15
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Mr. LucaSiensio', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113533182546837643861/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxPDXGoWHbTEdZlkNPq1i_A7o1anmFYsRy36M8tjm9rbcK6Cg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 weeks ago', 'text': 'Naples 15 – An Exclusive Luxury Italian Dining Experience in Madison

In the heart of Madison, Wisconsin, Naples 15 stands as a true Original Made in Italy excellence, where luxury, tradition, and authentic Italian culinary identity come together in a refined dining experience.

At the helm of the kitchen is Chef Salvatore Di Scala, a true chef of two worlds, an elegant interpreter of Italy’s great gastronomic heritage and a genuine guardian of Ischian cuisine. Each dish is created through a meticulous selection of premium ingredients, treated with respect, skill, and sophistication.

The journey begins with carefully crafted appetizers, celebrating both land and sea flavors and setting the tone with balance and refinement. The pizzas, light, fragrant, and perfectly executed, pay tribute to true Neapolitan artistry through expertly prepared doughs and top-quality ingredients.

Pasta dishes, the heart of Italian tradition, express the culture of taste through preparations that highlight authenticity, depth, and simplicity. The experience continues with land and seafood entrées that honor the richness of the Mediterranean, offering creations capable of delighting even the most discerning palates.

Desserts, elegant and harmonious, bring the culinary journey to a graceful close, accompanied by a truly authentic Italian coffee, delivering the genuine ritual of a perfect Italian ending.

Completing the experience is an outstanding wine selection, thoughtfully curated to complement each course with high-level pairings that showcase the best of Italian and international winemaking traditions.

Everything is elevated by an impeccable staff, attentive and professional, and by the vision of the owner, whose charisma, passion, and love for authentic Italy have shaped an exclusive atmosphere. The experience is further enriched by a distinctive and original music selection, setting the mood with style and personality.

Naples 15 is not simply an Italian restaurant in Madison—it is a true culinary destination, where uncompromising quality, identity, and understated luxury exist in perfect harmony.', 'time': 1769355924, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Francesco Satta', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107837755213051446565/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBtLwadY4MSGCsWGcaoI6VGRFO8-_k1dZNF50cAMGa-EYMpw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': 'From the time time we came we are feeling like we are in Naples, Italy.
The vibe of this restaurant it takes you right in Naples Italy like at home. The experience was wonderful. We had a true Neapolitan pizza with smoked buffalo mozzarella, prosciutto e rucola to die for. The appetizer was calamari alla malvasia taken out of the wood oven, eggplant parmigiana and fresh burrata with truffles. The main course was what in Italy we call cicala di mare, i can’t believe i found this special lobster in Madison WI. It was prepared with wonderful white sauce and cacio cavallo flambé on the wood woven and it was paired with a whine from Campania mastro Bernardino stilema fiano.
Incredibile che quasi quasi non lo trovi in Italia. Traditional Manfredi we ricotta and red sammarzano tomatoe sauce paired with radici taurasi. We finished with sfogliatella and bava with coffe Made with art of Neapolitan barrista.

It was great to find this restaurant away from Italy', 'time': 1770516779, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Samantha Minor', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106224777326654597316/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqFwS9Iq5BMRb1CDbgKeyvzaXmLqs_DEZXDkEYk8A5n1JAbqBn=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 2, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'This place has been hyped up to me for years as being one of the best restaurants in Madison, and I hate to say, I was a bit disappointed. We came on a Thursday and made a reservation. But when we arrived it took 15 minutes just to be greeted by a host. We then sat at our table for another 20 minutes before being waited on at all. Service throughout the evening was very slow and scarce. It took us over two hours to have our dinner which consisted of 2 drinks, one appetizer, two entrees, dessert and an espresso martini. I’m not sure if the intention is to mimic the Italian way of slow dinner, but even so, I’d expect drinks and maybe something to snack on much earlier. But we actually got our drinks after the food, so it just felt like a lot of waiting. Atmosphere is pretty loud and crowded which I think could be fun when you’re in the right mood! Food was very good but in my opinion, overpriced for what it is. I think at least if the prices are going to be this high, the service should match.', 'time': 1762488667, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 's w', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106382401147528278189/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_9luiVFQyj8niVewKY3a5khz7EDJnJ_fjHER_indtZ8iGqg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'This place was rocking beyond belief, amazing energy, and
The food took me to the nooks and crannies of Italy. It was overly busy the night I visited and service was great and food still arrived quickly. We tried tons of things and definitely recommend!', 'time': 1766248184, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Deneria LaShawn', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100406347875454382585/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXadTLqgbpCavIEtahb_wT15Mnegu_WtlJafZ05jnIzaYYvWO6D=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Everything I had to eat was GREAT! All of the wait staff arw the best make you feel like part of the family! I love it here!', 'time': 1766620479, 'translated': False}]

reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Sutthiphong Capaul', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111314727224782678237/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ98NicK4PtmkdEKpta-y0Ihg97TUCWSrYldvIS1JAVYPB6rQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Not super high end, but still good drinks and honest pours. I told the Bartender that the whiskey sour tasted different. He looked at it and said let me check the sour. He quickly changed it out and made a proper sour hassle free. I came many times before this happened and this was probably the only “incident” ever. Crowd usually has a good mix, not to polarized and tension free. Cheers!! Also parking is right around the corner! If you can’t find parking Thats a you problem.', 'time': 1766803109, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Serena DeMars-Hattabi', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102231982768662639393/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHXLYfHrbZpyi2tbRlm4GIaTvw5od6S9zdwx8c_xBEta3qyyg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'I wasn’t sure wether to give 2 or 3 stars but the bartenders are good and the atmosphere is nice. My biggest issue was my purse was stolen from the bar, I called 2 times with no answer, filed a police report, and then I went in about 2 weeks later to kindly ask if the bartenders saw anyone take a purse or if someone turned it in (my cards in my purse had unauthorized use from whoever stole it) and it turns out the man I was talking to was the general manger. He was very dismissive and I felt unheard and slightly disrespected. I felt like I was kind about it because it wasn’t his fault. I was purely seeking information or leads on my stolen purse in the bar he manages. He said said something along the lines of “are you sure it was actually stolen” and I said told him yes, my cards were used. Then in a condescending tone he asked if I called, filed a police report, etc. I told him I called and no one answered and reassured him by following with “but I know you guys are probably busy so it’s okay” he’s was just not nice or helpful about it at all. My medicine was also in my purse and he told me I should get on top of getting a refill. Not because he was concerned about me but seemingly said it just to be rude. I don’t know, decent bar but if that’s how the GM acts idk how decent it truly is. Great bartenders and vibes though! Just watch your stuff closely & try not to piss off the GM, order your drink and keep quit I suppose 😆

As for everything else: they have a beautiful real petrified tree inside the bar with lots of lights on it.

They have small “fenced” in outdoor seating in the summer on the sidewalk.

Price wise I’d say it’s average for Madison $10 or for a double rail and somewhere around $6 for a single rail.

name: the Cardinal Bar
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Giovanti', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/101418408952329119195/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFEfaQF9RcEmsqUlkmq47VRFTBl69tT_CiOrizst9K055AwQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 2, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': "Went on Saturday night for the latin night, the DJ was great but the bartenders were super rude. I was literally looked at and ignored by the 2 bartenders after waiting at least 5-10 minutes, where I was clearly standing and waiting for service. There were no other standing customers at the bar waiting for service and at least a third of the bar seats were empty. It was not busy during this time. The bar back who initially told me that she was not the bartender when I first arrived to the counter, ended up serving me after the time since I was obviously being ignored. I witnessed her speak to both bartenders on separate occasions, followed by each bartender look directly at me, then proceeded to carry on with other customers and conversations. Felt a little racist if I'm gonna be honest, considering that I am an African American male and that I was clearly looked at, ignored, then proceeded to watch other none AA people get serviced. Not trying to jump to conclusions but that was the vibe. And to add, when I finally ordered 'a Beer' I was told I had to spend a minimum of $10. So couldn't order just one. Also Will was AMAZING! Please let him know! But Madison folks please give this the place the love and patronage it deserves! You won’t be disappointed 🙌🏾', 'time': 1698524202, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Julie Mitchell', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106189878005944013155/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5SA4kAVDSiTKx6wTBhLNLAZ4xXLq99o_IdD-dqTErXZ7ft68=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Service isn’t just terrible, it’s nonexistent. I went to meet friends as we were celebrating three birthdays, including mine. I also had a visitor from France who was interested in seeing the hot flash nightclub.

In the 20 minutes I stood at the bar, clearly waiting for service, I watched four employees doing shots behind the bar and not paying any attention to who was waiting first. Not once did a single one of them make eye contact with me to let me know they had seen me. I stopped what I assume was a manager (also doing shots) to ask if it was possible to get drinks, and she said she’d send the bartender down. She did not.

My visitor and I left in disgust, walked over to Genna’s, had a drink in hand in under five minutes, and enjoyed the evening air outside.

I am a pleasant customer who always gets served quickly at just about any place. I don’t know why that didn’t happen at the Cardinal, but maybe staff shouldn’t be drinking on the job if they aren’t able to keep up with the flow of customers.', 'time': 1759574297, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Doctress Julia X.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116848294803096133043/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOEVHOSkcECoqKpzVkPO6Dw37Xgk8E5onUrt8rtmvoOgnI_3JZ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Went for a DJ a few weeks back. Good music, really enjoyed that. Inept, apathetic, and rude bartenders. Empty bottles and glasses on every conceivable surface and nobody can go out and bus those, apparently. 2 people standing behind the bar doing nothing (why?), one guy making drinks as fast as he can (not very fast) meanwhile, they are 2 deep at the bar. Embarrassingly bad bar service. Get some real bartenders. Lastly: the bathrooms are dirty and a total free-for-all. There is no place for women to get a moment of privacy or get away from creeps--not sanitary and not safe for women.', 'time': 1765151431, 'translated': False}]

Tasty cocktails.  Great place to stop by for a drink and tourists.  Nice experience', 'time': 1768257547, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Scott W', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102842621857820242708/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUib3WU2k6hVaimUagsfMg_UWC-it2s1h7ZQDZe0SKaS6-KingZgw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba8', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '9 months ago', 'text': 'Nitro is a beverage lounge, and not a "coffee shop".  I found this out when showing up a morning to meets some friends.   These comments are specifically meant to judge it against what I think a coffee shop should be.

It opens at 10:00 (sharp).  I got there earlier, looked inside to see people setting up, and the doors opened, and let in a line of people.  It has a minimal menu of coffees, lattes and teas.  Did not offer a London Fog, so I ordered a Chai Latte.  It was "okay".  A little weak on the tea, and not especially hot.  They don't offer any bakery or pastries (always like me a scone to go with the tea).

There are a bunch of different tables and seating areas.  Unfortunately some of the chairs that they have at the 4-tops, are wire metal, and terribly uncomfortable.  Since there were only 3 of us, we grabbed a small cocktail table, which had 2 cushioned chairs, and an ottoman.

The place was about a 1/3 full, and it was noisy.  The result of the music playing and the hard surfaces.

Perhaps, this beverage lounge is better suited for afternoon or evening gathering.  Just not a great "coffee shop" experience.  Not some place that I would come back too.', 'time': 1746368624, 'translated': False}]

reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Apollo Gonzales', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111023274717011771057/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXC2joyZjO63thwWCM292HyIQXrNN1AdAT6F5ACWQbkqX2FY3M_=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Hands down one of the best bars I’ve visited in the US in 2025. I don’t know what adventures might bring me back to Madison, but I know where I’ll be getting my cocktails when I’m there next.', 'time': 1767150986, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Elizabeth Grace', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113483915018653681509/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX19U9dD6dJhTeHGDDaPjnoNJdVcsonWKOB_4wHwbpFujPPJZ1q=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'You must come here!!! What an experience.

I love creative drinks and eats, I do it as often as I can. I would say I have a refined palette from cooking and eating high end meals myself.

The bar is gorgeous, the restrooms are clean and nice. The DRINKS! The quality of the liquor, the mixes, the garnishes. I can’t say enough good things. We came back to this bar twice because we couldn’t get enough. The drinks are strong so one was plenty for both us.

We both ended up getting NA cocktails just so we could keep trying the drinks when we were out our limit for drinks.

Good Googly Moogly, which was totally refreshing with pineapple and coconut cream.

The bar service was pretty slow, options were very limited. The games, in the span of a $20 game card, 2 games took our credit without letting us play. I would say at least another half the games we played were broken to some extent. Overall very crowded. Spent a lot of money for 45 minutes of broken games. Also keep in mind, each game is about $1.50 and last about 30 seconds so your money doesn’t go very far.

Someone who claimed he worked there started unplugging and restarting games after he overheard us complaining about so many being broken. Turns out he didn’t even work there ? I’m not sure what’s going on with this place but we are extremely disappointed. name: Jay's
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Kent Wannebo', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102083452008048641042/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsyaIli_v9pNPs9xfPtpQ5rKPpTo_FWq35z4RrnfPVXuV9FUiYaw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 years ago', 'text': "Everyone has different stories to share about The Red Shed and/or Wando's going back to at least 1994, Year of the 🌹.  Time to make new ones. Bar owner and old college roomie, Jay W bought Red Shed and now has Wando's and Jay's (formerly known as The Red Shed). As par for the course, Wando/Jay has known how to throw a good party since at least 1987 back in the days when we were prowling Johnson, Mifflin, West Wash, and occasionally Bowen Court, looking for people selling red cups.

Obviously we are a long time past the days of gathering to watch Michael Finley tear it up for Wisconsin, and rooting for Mike Tyson to wreak havoc on his opponents early in the first round and being sorry when he did because we just blew our money on PPV. And now The storied Red Shed slides back into the ghosts of bars past along with the likes of Joe Hart's, Madhatters, Bermudas, and R & R Station (among others).

They don't serve food other than popcorn at Jay's at this point 👉...but who cares? If you're that hungry, you just leave and walk half a block to Wando's where you can eat till your heart's content.

The crowd's the same (an eclectic mix of college students and alumni, Badger sports fans of all ages, locals, and also you-- when you get your butt down here. So wipe away your tears-- you're not that old (YET), and come wash the owies away by imbibing upon your spirit of choice with one of the best guys I know. Love you brother.

Warning: Fun times and new memories ahead. Where the hell else do you want to watch a game if you don't have Peacock 🦚? Tennessee got lucky. We'll be ready for them at the Dance, right Coach?

*Also: Wear Red and White. You'll blend in.

**And: Please tip your bartenders...many of them live off booze and 🍜 Ramen like we used to.", 'time': 1699708027, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Tara Perre', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109860813719790890175/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWT6BaA3KFzSXSclWjQ9m6efPeuBZi2ENCohhkAMIZhmdTVD4k=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 2, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'Service wasn’t great. name: Red Rock Saloon
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Jason', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107972583254492323105/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgY64YNUDGAhO_C5KTPCaQG0o4caf6uOgb-g32fOwKoK363cypsg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '10 months ago', 'text': 'A group of friends decided to try out Red Rock on a recent trip to Madison. The star attraction of Imaginary Factory is owner and bartender Hastings. Think Sam Malone with the affect of Norm and the sex appeal of Frasier.', 'time': 1754795767, 'translated': False}]

Atmosphere was fine, though I sat outside while the city leaf blower team throttled their despicable machines for the entire time I was there.", 'time': 1756396364, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Ali Ali', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104970651311694256008/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyuVBpxMtt_ugqyofuX631P8C2T5WhoFDi7dn371g3Ci3vp57phg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 2, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'We visited this restaurant in Madison on Labor Day for brunch, expecting a great meal based on the reviews I read beforehand. Unfortunately, the experience fell far below expectations. Although the long line outside seemed promising, it turned out to be misleading.

We ordered several entrees, including the Mango Bango, Waldorf Croissant, Tuna Salad, and Bagel with Eggs. However, none of the greens in the dishes were fresh, and the overall taste of the food was flat and bland. None of us were happy with our meals.

The staff were friendly, but the service was slow, taking around 30 minutes for our food to arrive despite most dishes being simple eggs and sandwiches.

This restaurant has received good reviews in the past, but based on our experience, I think it needs improvement. Hopefully, more honest reviews will help it get better.', 'time': 1727750151, 'translated': False}]

name: Wonderstate Coffee - Madison Cafe
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Sameer Khan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104271517097365110704/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_hQjFFMF8PxnnaoX-vssQAgBIx1vR6vlabc0O7mJFtZpa=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Place makes for a great study spot. There’s plenty of seating and natural light, and the vibe is modern cozy. The music wasn’t too loud and mostly instrumental, so not distracting. WiFi was fast and never dropped.

There did seem to be a lack of easily accessible outlets, so bring your stuff charged!

The iced vanilla latte w oat milks and croissant themselves were at par with what you’d expect at a boutique coffee shop. Extra points for the “for here” glass though, definitely beats a plastic cup any day.

All in all, happy I checked this place out during my stay in Madison.

Oh, and it’s at the foot of the capitol building and has the lake pretty much in its backyard… can’t beat the location.', 'time': 1759944265, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Madeleine (The Ruiner)', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108192577881248340796/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJONtJaRuCm7uXeXt8MVzgHNzPh86-B3uEJq80CNqwJjdezhVk=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'At noon on Saturday, what a scene,
The busiest café I’ve ever seen.
Ten minutes to order, four folks ahead,
By the time I reached the till, I felt misled.

The cashier was kind but clearly stressed,
Our cappuccino chat was not their best.
Fifteen more minutes, they called my name—
A latte appeared, not the drink I’d claim.

She offered a fix with a weary face,
But the line was long, I gave her grace.
The team worked hard, they gave their all,
But the system’s cracks began to fall.

name: Cafe Domestique - Allen St.
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Jessi Z.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115833927923177869671/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL3DgopA2XfJJa2Z0I30TNaoSvZPo2umlp42HLUTE2ayZr7mw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '8 months ago', 'text': 'I was so excited to check out this location as I love going to the one on Willy street. Also, learned they have a patio and they offer a wine bar Tuesday- Saturday from 3:00-10 pm !', 'time': 1750190722, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Bohemian Oasis', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115577378275518305955/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWVc7zEzvofYzQTNRlx9aKG-Xn9V_7si-N4F_eVmaoq-yKJwYG=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'This place was buzzing, and not just with caffeine! ☕️
The coffee was delicious, service prompt and kind, and the space was beautiful and clean.

I opened a little coffeeshop in the same location in 2003 (Dancing Grounds Coffee), and it was SO fun to see all the different renovations that had been done by subsequent tenants of the space.

Thanks for creating a Great Third Space for the neighborhood. name: Lakeside St. Coffee House
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Marie Pittler', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100897870342289283343/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJo4xiWrTAUJcyqlnfqVINPdt_lesjUnJnOcjp4I62To_i8rg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': "My mom and I needed a place to relax and regroup after a morning at UW Medical. This was perfect! Quiet, friendly chatter as people worked or visited; the staff was personable and professional, the view and the vibe was peaceful. Our hazelnut lattes were so delicious we ordered seconds and the breakfast bowls were out of this world. We'll definitely be back.", 'time': 1770835765, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Erin Henderson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100639501840346169271/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuyUqOqt6oPC1ZfBKLVWCKpn_JrICFN1caHNnaAQWyqFrfUUdSHw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': "A really pleasant business, in a wonderfully unexpected location. You open the door expecting whatever you've imagined a coffee shop to look like and are immediately put at ease with the quaint not cramped first open space where you place your coffee order. The scenery is nice, and there is ample sitting in the other rooms that reveal themselves as you continue to take in this highly recommended, great vibe having shop!", 'time': 1770850667, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Shelley Iverson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115035820543085251347/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkNMUYzIayMpxEjSAF3lMYzmS2xfHNXgJrlgNivIxi0Yo52sFCcw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '8 months ago', 'text': "This place is a hidden gem. Lakeside Street Coffee House has a little bit of everything, and that’s what makes it awesome. You walk in and there’s a quiet space if you want to study or work. Then there's another area where people are talking and hanging out — totally different vibe. You can sit outside right on the water, or head downstairs where they’ve got these cushy chairs and a chill lounge setup. The decor’s cool, a little artsy, a little quirky, just feels good to be in.

Sometimes they’ve got live music, which makes it even better. I had the pesto melt — and yeah, it was really good. Solid food, not just your typical coffee shop snacks.

Overall? Good food, great atmosphere, and enough different spaces to fit whatever mood you’re in. I’ll definitely be back.", 'time': 1749171028, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Алина', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113979862846047222416/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKSQsoNhr5nweq8XOpKO5lHmrEg4Rkyc2w5LzCzGM8eZA49bWz=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '11 months ago', 'text': 'This is a very unique coffee establishment that you do not see very often. The writing orders by hand on prices of paper and passion from welcoming stand to the bar staff is rarity to see. They do use square to take payment but do not utilize to create orders which square is designed for. This makes things slower by a lot.

The food came pretty tasty, specifically grilled cheese with garlic and fresh tomatoes was very good. The lattes also great.

Plenty of street parking around the place. Indoors and outdoors seating (when warm). Very simple place with no extra special ambiance. All chairs in this place are random and seem more like collection of random items than decor.', 'time': 1741222786, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Bridget Kelly', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107304894100295664600/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3X6-cbdl-Kjp0WpK636j8ZW7puEl1xV6VnwSTLqDgVardQa-L=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'While the prices are a little high, i can appreciate that this is a small business who’s truly making everything in house.
I love writing here.', 'time': 1768597122, 'translated': False}]

name: Bradbury's Coffee
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Frank Jiruska', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116586874298180757822/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQrRAvxhMGrn8NQA_dgGC8fdGS0A_lYIYGGw9xik2hiKNOKiO3=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Wonderful little coffee shop. The crepes were delicious, particularly the lemon curd crêpe. The coffee was delicious with beautiful latte art. The house made vanilla syrup was a highlight. We will definitely be back.', 'time': 1765558315, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Scott W', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102842621857820242708/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUib3WU2k6hVaimUagsfMg_UWC-it2s1h7ZQDZe0SKaS6-KingZgw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba8', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': "First time here. We were visiting Madison and walking around the downtown area. It's a small space (almost tiny) that sits at a narrow intersection, so it's literally a pie-shaped space. The upside is that there are lots of windows with natural light.

The inside seating consists of long tables or counters along the windows. This is not a place where you are likely to hunker down for a quiet or private conversation. You can tell that storage space is at a premium, with boxes stashed in overhead areas or equipment in the bathrooms.

The staff there were very pleasant and helpful.  Ended up getting a Chai Latte (extra foam) in a mug. It didn’t take long to make, and they delivered it out to the table. It was an excellent drink — hot, flavorful, extra foam, and not too sweet. A joy to drink.

The atmosphere is a bit manic. With the tight seating, you can feel a bit claustrophobic, or on the other hand, like you are at a concert and getting energy from the crowd.

For me, it's a place to grab a drink and find a quiet space elsewhere. So not likely a place that I would return to.", 'time': 1759800291, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Marissa Gehrke', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114399247079063544886/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIbduYljVWmQarb2BwFm3eyl-szolhmEapDi2uuwLK7IAe4A=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Bradbury’s is one of my favorite coffee shops in Madison. The crepes are delicious, and I love the cold brew. There’s limited seating inside, but I’ve always been able to find a spot. It’s fun to try the seasonal crepe varieties they add to the menu. The staff is also friendly and kind.', 'time': 1764474014, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Tom Zeien', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114602764735632877901/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWL8jF29ez-GzGWlhOCQjyqHWHzE8KyCY7nJfOE_YTCSJqpedsv9w=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'Stopped in here to sit with a small iced latte and eat a crepe and both were delicious! It’s in a really neat space: modernist industrial, small, cozy, and quirky. I really enjoyed the vibe. Service was pleasant. My only critique—though it almost adds to the vibe—is the amount of dust and cobwebs up in the lights and rafters.', 'time': 1754329610, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Elle Arjee', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114667258065924783008/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRf7y4o3jIyBmHhJFP8fHHwYwk5E08p4jmN1roS-aQ9A7apNbW=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "Love this cute little place!!! I got the honey butter and sea salt crepes...super delicious!!! And nice and strong coffee!!! Quite a few people messaged me about my pic...yes there's a bite taken because I couldn't wait to try these amazing crepes... I'm sorry I couldn't wait to take a pic before trying lol!!! Super amazing food!!!", 'time': 1762312380, 'translated': False}]

name: Ellipse Coffee & Crepes
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Mohammed Hosain', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109803700240729193212/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXbPqnuIiurX3lQQA8yUa1_KN7EhnoTGqSezF3fFi6dB6AmSZW6A=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': "Love this place. name: Bloom Bake Shop
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Linda Franzen', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113642201093506358089/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRSazBkjsh77F5DqoiIwDBzumfNmmlFnU_sneQBZwY_Becag=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': "Outstanding bakery in Madison with great bread, pastries and sandwiches. Everything I've tried has been amazing! Highly recommend a visit. Some of their pastries can also be found at local coffee shops (Alice Good).", 'time': 1768672198, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Michael A.', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113102362926511717501/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk9iKrt_EaK0LSyjYzkcLAecZ4ztsxmw63_xNWzkSOANpncQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Have been coming to Bloom for several years ever since they had the original location in Middleton . After opening up their East Madison location I go to that one more often .

I was in the Monroe neighborhood and could not resist to stop in to the mothership location.

Cases were packed with amazing savory and sweet items as always . They also make sandwiches to go if you put your order in .

There was a line of people waiting to get in which is normal . It is worth the wait - trust me !

Gluten free case to the left of the register is full of bakery items , cupcakes and scones . A good gf selection to choose from .

For a savory I tried their pesto pinwheel which is an interesting take of a pesto filled roll extra fluffy and pull apart . For a sweet I could get everything they make but I did go with the classic cinnamon roll. Similar fluffy airy as the pesto pinwheel with a great balance of cinnamon sugar and frosting .

I don’t frequently go to Monroe neighborhood as it can be hard to find street parking , however whenever I find myself in that part of town I will always stop in to Bloom for a special treat .', 'time': 1756567472, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Brittany', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111912947226134931078/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8YQe1Bb3NM03vJ19JyjQWW4aPhSWGWLaBsEksPMimFHjz8A=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Lovely little bakery! They’ve got quite the daily selection of baked goods and glad that I was in town early as it opened as there was a line started before they even opened today! I grabbed a box full of goodies and they were delicious!

There is also a vegan/gluten free section in its own case.', 'time': 1766524627, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Keri Ferguson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102666966762844924517/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKT54eedJKvMNmI7s1DCUot1KNvcJpQk93hacI6rX9k3lOWsje=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Any of the Croissants! The layers are straight outta Paris! Our Favorite is the plain... so simple yet unique: soft airy, delicate, buttery innards with a tan, crunchy outter layer. Peeled apart, each section is good, but together, is wholesome yummy. The morning bun is just a Croissant with honey (slightly sweet, not American-ized). No one flavor overpowers another.

And vegan options: donuts, cookies, specialty cake (sometimes an extra one for walk-ins). Also, bread. Oh! And dog treats!', 'time': 1757603884, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'W Wk', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111380119768113029098/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfQNcIxTWyexy_SMHDnVGd1oA-f5WXPgALTLfzey5hpQXOFtiDww=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': "One could say good things about Bloom Bake Shop.
Unfortunately, I cannot.
I can only say FANTASTIC and ABSOLUTELY WONDERFULLY GREAT things.
From standard baking to vegan and gluten free, Bloom provides the best. In my opinion.
You will just have to go, buy a sampling and then judge for yourself. If you're not impressed, we'll then it's on you.", 'time': 1758645955, 'translated': False}]

name: Broken Board Coffee
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'melanie tornoe', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117653893234083716177/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1axFsU3B0aGJVJZeIxgThYbhaBgTCHEIUR3ksE4qZ27yyv8Bk=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'What an absolute gem! This shop perfectly combines the thrill of boardsports with the comfort of great coffee. I stopped in for a quick break and ordered the sweet potato latte, and wow, it completely blew me away. The flavor was rich, earthy, and perfectly balanced, with a freshness you can taste in every sip. The barista’s latte art was a beautiful touch that made the experience feel extra special.

On top of that, the atmosphere is so cool, a mix of snowboard and skateboard culture that feels welcoming and inspiring. Whether you’re into boards or just hunting down amazing coffee, this place delivers on both fronts.

I’ll absolutely be stopping here every time I travel this route. Highly recommend checking them out if you want top-tier gear AND coffee that rivals the best cafés.', 'time': 1759259980, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Jen T', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112944412946650055921/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6StfMmQjE6NLOM65MAAUWbjfkYsYXpxFWtSjvKz-2bA5ygic=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': "Broken Board Coffee has my heart. Jared is the best, I call him a flavor potion-ist because he concocts some of the most unique, divine seasonal specials (Thai Me Up, Hide Tide, and Sweeet Potato are a few favs). House-made syrups. Quality ingredients. Local bakery treats. Lovely humans work here. It's a fun space to pop in or hangout for awhile. Fun design & branding & merch.. stickers, pins, two of my favorite t-shirts are from Broken Board. This place is truly a gem in Madison.", 'time': 1769971777, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Kelly Scott', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102381433439704816441/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0_fp6DPwkOagEvftDwww3lAxkfxFfh9Ng4XYseweFBcwMaRTS9Q=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'Are you kidding me? name: Bassett Street Brunch Club
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Mimi Tran', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109612703916490747610/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLD_UlqEb3m330_WmVOpT7enRAAqv-XzMjAwZNYnjeocbzbNWX=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 2, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'To preface, our server was great! Super nice and considerate. They were short staffed at the bar and our food came out before the drinks, but she was good at communicating with us and comped part of our drinks. The place itself was cute and trendy.

Gave it a 2 star because of the food. We ordered the poutine, pot roast, fish & chips, chicken & waffles, and chicken salad sandwich. We really liked the poutine. The chicken & waffles was good too, but the rest of it was kind of eh or disappointing. The fried fish didn’t hold any form and fell apart as soon as you touched it. I’m used to pot roasts being very tendered and smothered down, but this one was dry and there wasn’t much of the sauce on the plate to help flavor the dryness out. This part might be a preference thing, but mashed potatoes weren’t super creamy and some of the vegetables didn’t seem like it was fully cooked through. The veggies had a crunch to it that you would expect from a raw one. I also got the pickle margarita, which was kinda fun and unique.

Maybe we should have stuck with the brunch food since it is a brunch club, but the other entrees were kind of a let down.', 'time': 1761492696, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Viggy Vanchi', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106908005886548112552/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUelmhXTl9JmJFbiiUVctIqhxA9eNaigNGPajEMr_5LzSlkRfZzHQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'Visited here at the recommendation of a recruiter for the company I applied for. name: The Marquette Cafe
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Barbara Gulten', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100511303922034423711/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_GvCD6E5T9HcViTxOX5vZftm0vslp6usz9eXjcrW_pT_pABc=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba7', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '9 months ago', 'text': 'Charming small neighborhood cafe with freshly made food. And might be making the best matcha latte in town! No joke - it was the best one I had in a while. Service is lovely, you order at the counter but they are helpful and bus the tables afterwards. They are also thoughtful and ask about specifics to get your order right. We had a lovely delicious brunch. The place was busy, clean, and pleasant. Menu has some vegan options and they can accommodate gluten free. Portions are very decent. What we ordered came with two sides, more than what we expected. They had some big windows open to let fresh air in.

Parking can be tricky, it’s all street parking in that area. So you may have to parks some place near and walk. Highly recommend it - turns out this nook it’s better than other places that have bigger names.', 'time': 1747504589, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'danna guzman', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105282263213907681811/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJGK_C1UiNUm7BY9OxI7priJNzSYvJixWeX0n-kPbVUbkn0LE=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'Probably my favorite cafe in Madison!! nice and quiet ambiance, pleasant decor, very tasty food, beverages don’t have that rich of a flavor but still good. There is a cute little patio in the back as well!', 'time': 1722005049, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Maimoua', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112859603594659803216/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYWVW6DxBQfOhbPi2R-xNa2iW1xUPiQSnI1nT6Tp9W37gf1nQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '3 years ago', 'text': 'Overall, a decent menu with reasonable prices. I suppose you get what you pay for. name: MOKA
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Patrick Dunlop', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100915186593230566215/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoYhyAVzF-UqdHIU6-WDpp7w-KYeWP_1E7QjtcPWUUA2PLwqrL=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba7', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': "The wife loves a latte, and this place present and pleasant atmosphere, no wait and easy to access. The breakfast burritos are another reason I keep coming back—they’re delicious, filling, and never disappoint. Honestly, in three years of visiting, I’ve never had a bad experience.

name: Bandit - Tacos & Coffee
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Jack Nelson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116019857366613318972/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfx3LzYtgnZnEsoKPJnPa146AeHYuXPBRTlvZMWnHDmKsT6jv-=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Good food but not a good value.

3 Tacos and a coffee for $30 after tip and tax. On first glance that sounds like a decent deal but 3 tacos were tiny all three added up to the size of my hand. The “nitro” cold brew is not nitrogenated, it’s just black cold brew poured over ice!

The coffee itself was actually very good and the ingredients for the tacos seemed quality. I did enjoy my meal but it’s just not a good deal.

Small portions turned me off a bit but otherwise it’s decent spot.', 'time': 1758850182, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Barbara Gulten', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100511303922034423711/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_GvCD6E5T9HcViTxOX5vZftm0vslp6usz9eXjcrW_pT_pABc=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba7', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '11 months ago', 'text': 'Cute coffe shop and taco place that’s often forgotten. Might be much more personable in summer. Drafty and arid atmosphere in winter. Seating is not comfortable either. It is self service. Food is, at least the tocos we all had were really good. Fresh solid ingredients. Would go to try more food. As a taco lover I had to try it! Enjoy.', 'time': 1740853075, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Thomas Falls', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116659982423612121777/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3HsCnyAtzpui9Xw-dIVmcOxV2V_9to0KFrOhjVUT2yJ5Z440=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '11 months ago', 'text': 'What a hidden gem (tucked next to Local Motive big yellow train engine/bar)!!! We walked over, placed our order, paid, took our coffee and number & chose a table to await the goodies.

We stopped in for a late breakfast comprised of a tall delicious drip coffee, a Bandito Breakfast Burrito, Steak & Eggs Taco and a Bandito Tostada. All tacos & tostadas are in house freshly made corn tortillas and it SHOWS! These were supple & flavorful…now add the well prepared & generous toppings! The heritage pork shoulder rubbed with coffee, cocoa & pasilla was incredibly tender and loaded with flavor complimented with a ribbon of scrambled egg beneath and fresh cilantro atop it all. Absolutely wonderful. The steak & egg taco & Bandito Tostada had similar rub preparations and were also wonderful.

We still had room for the delicately fried finger sized churros (8) that were crisp on the bite but had an almost creamy texture within and dusted with sugar & cinnamon. A decadent but necessary order. We comfortably shared a bag for dessert.

The decor is brick along with an abstract mural in an open space and LOTS of sunshine. Free WiFi too!

Would I recommend Bandit Tacos? HECK YEAH! Hustle over and enjoy a delicious meal that the folks take time & passion to create.', 'time': 1741288262, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Daniel Willcockson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/107775049699240024969/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXCYKi2zExfYsULYbfP6lM3ulCY1XtOgs-tSeUa12WaDXgcizG=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'Update: Bandit’s tacos is awesome. Their tacos are tacos for hipsters - so if you’re looking for a classic taco, this ain’t the place for you. That said, I think their tacos are great! The only complaint we had was the short rib taco. We thought it’d be the best, but it was actually super bland. Definitely would not recommend the short rib taco. Our favorite was the mushroom taco. It was PACKED with flavor. Like a crazy amount of flavor. My brain cannot comprehend. You should try this place.', 'time': 1717438105, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Egg Queen Wanabee', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105831160893639544172/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkQb34w3TBL-2CbOoTuUbOBT3uygqH7_rKz8fXTyr63AagEiotdA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'Nice atmosphere.  Good food served quickly. Prices are average; 2 tacos for me was $11 (items are a la carte). I did not get a beverage but water from their water station in the dining area. Dining area was clean. Order taker was exceptionally pleasant and courteous. Bathroom was clean and is adjacent, or in a pass through to a connected bicycle shop.
Location is directly next to train tracks and while we dined a short train (maybe 8 freight cars?) went by. Parking might be a little tough as I noticed the lot seems a bit full at the lunch hour.
I ordered 1 Short Rib and 1 Whitefish taco; both exceptionally delicious.
Overall, I would eat here again.
If you deem this review helpful please give it a 👍.', 'time': 1723925815, 'translated': False}]
