name: Stadium Takeout
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Gabriel Rouse', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/117368765633501691458/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIoWPeB3k2t75ZmNSVvZ4UVgOGTGen_bpvpcrErtnks0dVZsA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'The Philly cheesesteak tasted better than you could ever hope. The fries are so good you don’t even need ketchup for them. Kat is one of those rare, once-in-a-lifetime service workers who truly makes you feel seen, heard and welcomed. She took great care of us and every single person who walked through the door. Stadium is lucky to have her and we were lucky to be served by her. And THAT is why you need to come here.', 'time': 1760894631, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Zu Ekpunobi (Dr. Zu)', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110682854831241126532/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYaVS7sapyZiJ8nMvqeEKPSURir-w42qtX66kMGhv2XUDAzqL9og=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': "Decor and ambience need some work, but if you're here for good food then you've come to the right spot.

Excellent Italian beef sandwiches and I hear the fries are good too. I got the Donfather and I'd recommend that with gravy on the side and maybe some bbq sauce. Lots of great options though!", 'time': 1767022223, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Aaron Scully', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113657985722637332065/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPQaqMr_HVAn2HH_YnrxpKR3FYfmIzYoTRPzCnV8YhPxBwIg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Great first experience, I’ll definitely be ordering again. The menu has so many good options. I got the Italian beef patty melt with whiz, a Chicago dog, and cheese fries and everything was 10/10.', 'time': 1759454152, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Shane Burgess', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110659900500163562230/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVhhrGj5OAncz8LUIOuK4Pieeu2qHnSxOYE-zipPksntVglm4=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Had never been before, and now disappointed this was my first time. Ended up going with the DonFather with hand cut fries, absolutely delicious. Could have used a few more fries, but food was great. Service was excellent, front of house staff was very welcoming and friendly.', 'time': 1758848547, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Tony Rowland', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106811276698862788640/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6LyuZwJAgbVkavuASGBCc0hSUjIHtB12st0YKLhrEpnUa-w=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': "There's no other place for stadium style food that does it better. This should be your go-to, whether you're in the area or not, and want to get your hands dirty with some sandwiches and wings that are full of flavor and trust me- they WILL get messy.

The fries are decent. They are pretty basic, though I was surprised with how light they are, which means they are cooked perfectly. The loaded stadium fries are bomb, and you get a very fair portion for the price.

There's daily specials to mix things up from between the week, and I haven't had one bad or disappointing item on the whole menu. Everything is great.

What's even better is the staff are all cool and very helpful. They make the place even livlier and you'll come back just for the friendly atmosphere.

The only improvement possible is if the place had more room for more customers.", 'time': 1765905843, 'translated': False}]

name: Parthenon Gyros
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Chris', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102740663824413019939/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIRfuDS0uklcr7acac64rFIoARxNgDXXRykqJ_XtcnxKfNqgIq=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'I was led here by a coupon for a free gyro and I hope in every timeline I find that coupon. The aesthetics were spectacular. I was greeted by a warm employee and a Greek statue, pictured below. There was an optional (hidden) virtual tour, and an upstairs roof garden that stunned me. The walls were clad in Greek memorobilia, and I felt at home in some steamy Aegen beach. The food was fantastic, certainly worth the price. For a restaurant within a "Raising Cane's" or "Healthy Fastfood" priceline, or even a somewhat upscale diner, "Parthenon Gyros" excels.', 'time': 1760564662, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Sameer Khan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104271517097365110704/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_hQjFFMF8PxnnaoX-vssQAgBIx1vR6vlabc0O7mJFtZpa=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 3, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Was craving gyros and saw this place was close by, thought I’d give it a try. I got the “freaky greek” sandwich, which was pitched to me as 6oz of gyro meat (compared to the regular gyro sandwich which had 4oz) as well as 2 chicken skewers on top (which the “mega” gyro sandwich doesn’t have). Sweet. $19 total.

The vibe itself is pretty cool. The workers are friendly and the place is clean. The patio seating upstairs is beautiful and is great for people watching on the street. There’s a street level patio too, but I highly recommend you sit upstairs… much nicer and secluded.

The sandwich itself was SUPER mid. Probably Sysco or other large food distributor. The gyro meat didn’t really have the consistency or thickness of gyro meat… it was more like the shredded flank you’d find in a Philly cheesesteak? Idk, was just super dry. The chicken skewers were a bit juicier but again, probably from the back of a freezer truck.

All in all, it’s a decent med spot by campus with good vibes. $19 definitely got a lot of sandwich, which I was content with, but I’d personally rather pay almost $20 for a sandwich, fries, and a drink like at other places…. Allows for a change of flavor as eventually the dryness of the sandwich gets old here.

Glad I tried it, would recommend if someone’s in the area and down bad for some Mediterranean food. Probably won’t go again myself.', 'time': 1760415384, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Jodi Olson', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108803732141558290359/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTXZYtP11vU_cpvfMm_lQy7kEG1TuSBHHAmJxWLhYTDDWnYXJ5=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'This was our first time here. We have fairly high standards for gyros and this place does not disappoint. The atmosphere is fun with greek head busts and fun posters all around. The staff was helpful and friendly. My husband really enjoyed the spicy gyro and I ordered the Chicken Caesar pita. We both enjoyed our selections! We also ordered the cheese fries and they are very good!', 'time': 1756155131, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Lady TANDA', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104987009686637514809/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXof__YUb-w8zlzXOgwvdn8CST9BH7vTwKlia2JncWKZoxq-8u9Ag=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 2, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': 'The portion for this does not feed 2 people. This is supposed to be a plate that can feed 2 people. Something should be noted. They will give you damn near a bag of fries but when you orde more meat it comes in an aluminum foil with maybe two slivers of meet chopped finely.', 'time': 1770866449, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Kristine Gallagher', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102107757386235955888/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7jknWcePHNVzUmviDHG56muGPy7guFfRBMP3VsHk0fG5_QxrO=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Since 1987 I been grabbing a gyro, fries, Pepsi and side of ketchup. My bandmate Joel always ordered extra-meat.

Today, famished from a musical production, my daughter(new bandmate) and I excitedly hurried down State Street after first parking in a city parking ramp.

Sure, we got distracted by the dresses in Princess Of India. It was there when I finally bought myself a formal having never once attended a prom of any kind that I realized my debit card was missing.

My son had already lost my Visa Wednesday at the Union so this card was my last plastic. Gratefully Abdul of Princess of India accepted my Venmo which was a good thing as he had to personally phone me that my daughter had left her hat.

All that running around accerbated our hunger and Man, were we ready to order.

We stopped short at the door reading the fateful words: WE ARE CASHLESS.

No Venmo. Just cards.

I tried to negotiate for food like a smooth criminal, but no dice.

Thankfully my son showed with the card and we got our grub.

I’m super-confused by this company policy change. Workers didn’t seem like they were actually Greek either. Something about the way they said, not called out “O-PAH” after my left tip.

I hope everyone is okay there.', 'time': 1759021649, 'translated': False}]

name: Adi's Rice Noodle Soup
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'm', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102812104245623494104/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV81rsUNqAhvfA68xQnsINLfGUYozItXFz5OrSzD8QfL6eKiwt_=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'Update: There was a change of ownership so this is now called Liya’s noodles not Adi’s.

Literally a hidden gem! I’m pretty sure the other review was meant for Teemoji, because Adi’s is inside the Asian grocery store Tjikko, and in my opinion it’s my favorite Chinese food spot in Madison. There’s even a sushi counter in there too!

I really hope this place never closes. I’d order way more often if they were on a delivery app. They even have a poster saying they’re on Fantuan.  I downloaded the app just for them but they’re not actually on it yet - but hopefully soon!', 'time': 1765051451, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Tavon Nammavong', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/114166437974251338171/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoZfKcmvlrFaGgtJyCNVMdn-yqh10_9l1qTmhzCgrBfvg_OACz=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'I dropped my drink and they made it free of charge. The food and drinks here are good overall 😋', 'time': 1760047761, 'translated': False}]

name: Baked Wings & Things
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Cortney Forman', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106386096194230237228/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJubwb6kOLZ0_BDHD0z-q5kJL_gSvk7ONQhgNMQeWmP_FzIA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a week ago', 'text': 'Placed my first order today through the "goodie bag" app.  My sister picked up the order and said the guy at the counter was super friendly and patient as she picked all the sauces.  The wings were very delicious.  The boneless wings have a soft breading with a super thick sauce.  The chicken was cooked perfect and was juicy.  We will try the traditional wings tomorrow but they looked great.  Will definitely be returning customers!', 'time': 1771046624, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Janien Hammonds', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111008406278983593523/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7dZz3bMh6XYZ8jX8-g4aNhGCTZTyhO46CSa1sVAWqlAdDW23T0Q=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 weeks ago', 'text': "I had an amazing experience here. I drove from Chicago and just randomly stopped here before heading back. Jackie greeted me when I walked in and honestly gave me one of the best customer service experiences I've ever had in life. She is why I tipped. The food is really good too! I had buffalo wings, a chicken wrap, and a chocolate chip cookies. So good. It was clean, well lit, but not too bright, not very packed, but I prefer it that way and the last Chicago Bears game was playing on multiple large screens. Great vibe! There was also a young lady working behind the counter who gave good customer service as well when I had a question or two and Jackie stepped away.

The next time I'm in Madison, I'm definitely stopping through here.", 'time': 1769384831, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Christina Gifford', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112060573260317428367/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_Dsgns5ajh-A3t9dpKy7RHMrzsryFtaOs1fsLm_10wF-bHW6j=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': 'Wings & Things might just be the best decision we made on our trip to Madison (sorry to the museums and lakes). As a vegetarian, I usually stare longingly while my partner devours wings... but not here! Their plant-based wings were so good that we went back not once, but 3x in 36 hours. In addition, the service was top-notch!

I tried the mango habanero, hot honey, and honey BBQ dry rub, and each one made me question my life choices up to that moment. On our last day, they even let me order the wings with waffles, and omg I was so happy.

My partner (a devoted carnivore) admitted the veggie wings were awesome, though of course he still swears by the meat ones. Either way, this place is a win for everyone. If you’re in Madison, skip the cheese curds for once and get yourself some wings & waffles. Trust me.', 'time': 1755361315, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Yanin Naiyachit', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112787762771903826178/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpN6uFvzBtM74DMCSkAP3ub6GYR0pHaQAQ0vjwAwJpauDwhW2yug=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba6', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'Didn’t expect much at first, but the wings were really flavourful and cooked well. Service was super friendly and made the visit even better. The place has a lively sports bar feel, right in the middle of Madison, perfect for grabbing some wings, trying out a few sauces, and catching a game. Worth a stop if you’re downtown!', 'time': 1757642039, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Hao Yuan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112769440056822775865/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiyHEoIoo--JKM5GebIu4XaMnJh7R2B5bBmxosTVqmH3Q0Pos=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'Came here for lunch recently with the family and really enjoyed our meal. They have a variety of options, and while I prefer fried wings, their baked wings were extremely tasty and were a good value for the size and amount you get. My wife and kid also thought their smash burgers were delicious.

We came right as they were getting busy before all the Sunday football games kicked off, and my wings took a little while to come out. A staff member came over multiple times to update me on the status and brought it out piping hot, so they really seem to care about providing great customer service. We look forward to coming back again!', 'time': 1762368404, 'translated': False}]

name: Dotty Dumpling's Dowry
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Jacqueline Marie', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115061177501266221099/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWu2-5lRA2BpeicOl4EOUrefKJ5ax3hnIDt-S0BrpMdX16KnwV4Jg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '6 months ago', 'text': "Started with the fried mushrooms, then got the turkey burger + sweet potato fries. The BEST burger anywhere hands down. I can't describe how amazing it was, you just need to try it for yourself! Also the sauces were on point. Awesome beer selection, our fave was the Spotted Cow -- crisp, refreshing and light enough to enjoy with our meal. Service was so friendly and super attentive. 20/10 experience 👌", 'time': 1753988225, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Chris Montan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109526005997940507201/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_YlqT9O5vctV_v33d5ZyyDW6y93pB8zNPMtMZPK4zGDRIjPeVGg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': "Was a little tough finding street parking on a Friday in middle of December but we found a metered spot after a little looking. The decor of this restaurant along with the atmosphere were very inviting with lots of historical items from the city on the walls which I always love. Service was fast and friendly without being too much which we appreciate very much. I chose the pub burger with a side of the coleslaw and that decision was proven to be perfect. They do their coleslaw in house and definitely had the unique twist on it with finely shredded cabbage and veggies. The burger was exceptionally perfect on the juiciness factor and that garlic sauce on it absolutely enhanced the flavor beyond comprehension. We'd love to come dine here again!", 'time': 1766250889, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Brandon Brabender', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100098618689059808404/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXC1t5LflnVCckkL_vs3j73N3nC-iRTDv0Wmuf1XuVnqWOu-8LKKw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'This is the spot. It is worth the hype. Being the best burger in Madison is clear. Strong contender for the best burger anywhere. It helps that service is always awesome, beer is great, inviting atmosphere, and the list goes on.', 'time': 1761706943, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Essi', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116329353730642684278/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXRzcv3wnXpg-yKa8duXEfdWFVQAlOmCf2Z9PWC2yGh85e1nA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'We ordered Melting Pot- and Veggie- burgers, along with drinks and an appetizer of Mac & Cheese Wedges. Everything tasted good, but we found the portion of Mac & Cheese Wedges to be a little too small for the price.

The restaurant was busy for a weekday afternoon, so we had to wait about 10 minutes for a table. Service was ok.', 'time': 1758336669, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Saniya Khan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/103100409378346765981/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjbSBwXHsnG8-wjTRMSmzhv5hyQ-fPeVlQULFY1BMc0GGG3u1I=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '8 months ago', 'text': 'Tried this burger spot and really enjoyed it! 🍔

-The “Cheese Curds” were a hit—crispy and tasty.
- My husband had the “Heart Throb Burger”, a spicy combo with Pepper Jack cheese (minus smoked bacon) and their signature Heart Throb Sauce—he loved it, especially the sauce!
- I went for the “Homemade Spicy Veggie Burger”, the bean patty was flavorful, though not spicy to me. I also added grilled onions, tomatoes and lettuce to my burger. The Baja sauce was a bit light, so I added their English Garlic sauce—which was absolutely yum!

Definitely a must-try!', 'time': 1749790680, 'translated': False}]

name: Potbelly
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'Heather Li', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108382391261837993357/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfTTPcXfeNxzuLsJs8aAjZjtPQtECWS59v_ppUos080XJFqEh-fw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '8 months ago', 'text': "I love Potbelly's Mediterranean sandwich, and the sandwich I got on 5/31/25 was exactly as I remember it with one exception. I don't remember the hummus being spicy the last time I had it, but I really enjoyed the spicy hummus! The two people working yesterday were very nice and made everything quickly. The location of this shop is perfect to hit up after the farmers market on Saturday. It fits very well into the whole State Street vibe. Potbelly offers decent food at a decent price.

I just wish Potbelly had more locations around Madison.", 'time': 1748785670, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Chris M', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115732568755647408118/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOOChX_bux-TVIW7guOvf61SBJI-NQy0-KmONO3cTxUYy_HrM=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '3 months ago', 'text': 'I usually love Potbelly’s food and the staff are great. This evening for national sandwich day, however, Potbelly bit off more than they can choose by running a BOGO promo and not having an adequate online ordering system.
My order in the app said ready for pickup at 7:01. When I arrived at 7:10 and waited until 7:35 to ask if my order was even within the next 10 of the queue it wasn’t.
Overall, frustrating evening for me and my partner as well as the staff and other patrons.', 'time': 1762222949, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'simeon fyksen', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111718100305505978250/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-Ue89WtkE3abmi3Q7-L5Zrraj_U11625EBzpS6u59shuN4o0Xfg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': 'a year ago', 'text': 'This is the steakhouse beef sandwich and it is inedible and disgusting. The bleu cheese is sour and liquified. The “beef” is stringy, bland, and has such an off-putting texture. Maybe other sandwiches are fine but please do not get this one. Did not finish it.
Management did reach out to me and wanted to solve the issue and offered me a free sandwich but nothing can really fix what happened here. I do appreciate the effort and care. They are trying. However, this does not make your sandwiches taste better. There is literally a Jimmy Johns, Jersey Mikes, and more within a block. Go there and do not risk buying something like this.', 'time': 1720723014, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Nick', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105225456940974333733/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfqo8mfVl_Dvsw6C0n6vQe8-OZZI9vmOzveLccCkYj_QfjsQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'Pot pie soup is amazing.  Prime rib sandy is also good.  Broccoli cheddar yum.  Chili Mac is what it is.  Never met a chili Mac I didn’t like.', 'time': 1760666443, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Jack Browning', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111125683628179871581/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUD7v38ejRm3rIdKc7n91vgbCrsTtBza8rDYfdgO4ofi6X3RJc=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '5 months ago', 'text': 'I had the Cubano and a shake, and my wife had the Mediterranean. We both enjoyed our food, and the window seat on State Street. name: Jersey Mike's Subs

name: Taco Bell Cantina
reviews:
[{'author_name': 'J', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106002319479423549399/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlxjxdMuMu6TAIXl1fNytW7wK73DcjcWOo6ZreCEzKMX1IPg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '3 weeks ago', 'text': "This Taco Bell is the most disgusting place I have ever laid my eyes on. It takes an exhaustive effort to lift your feet off of the floors. I felt like a mouse stuck on a glue trap. I have been here a few times and it's always terrible. The soda machines have never been cleaned and never will be cleaned. I am not kidding when I say that you can taste the mold or whatever other nastiness is in the soda machine and nozzles. Anyone who has worked in this type of industry knows that these machines need to be cleaned every night and deep cleaned every week, if you order a soda from here you will notice that it tastes almost like burnt hair. Just so incredibly disgusting it's unbelievable really. You cannot order at the counter, but they have kiosks. I use the mobile app and consistently what happens is my food is ready just sitting there and I can see it and it always takes them several minutes to simply just hand it to me. This most recent time I waited a very long time for my food to be ready and then it sat for a couple of minutes so I went up to kindly ask the worker if my order was ready, knowing that it was, and he just did not interact with me at all. he was 2 feet in front of me and just looking down a little bit and he looked extremely high, and had large open sores on his face. I don't think someone with open sores on their face should be working around food at all. I cant believe he was allowed to work in that condition. I did not even eat my food after seeing this I just threw it away. I think I have a moral obligation to call the health department to inspect this place and shut it down.", 'time': 1769878472, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Inniya Krishnan', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109743135082720102379/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDlYDjit4PU1-HOaPL1C6FhZ5FZAOrHlbgwa6oObWW8TzvXQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'There was a huge line, and our food was already ready, but no one was moving since everyone was waiting for their names to be called. I walked over to the mobile order pickup table to check if one of the bags was ours — I just turned it around to look for our name — and a worker suddenly yelled at me not to touch any food and said they’d call the cops. I was honestly really shocked and embarrassed since I didn’t mean any harm.

After that, we tried to ask for our food, but he completely ignored us, so we ended up waiting around 45 minutes even though our order was already ready. I totally understand that there are food safety policies, but the way the situation was handled felt unnecessarily aggressive and unprofessional.', 'time': 1760296325, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Jake Leow', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/118410491774064178039/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzCUiKpPAop_yjz-3wFMJhYJJTvLP5nv4nHGF4u1-wnRumRA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'ordered when it was fairly busy, but my “order” took  over 2 hours to come out. By the time I left it the restaurant was all but empty, only DoorDash orders going out.I only ordered 2 bean and rice burritos and a cheese quesadilla. My friend who ordered right before me got theirs within 15 minutes. I asked about it every 15-30 minutes because I assumed I had been skipped but they kept confirming it would be right out. Staff admittedly did seem annoyed with me for checking but I was getting impatient after 2 whole hours for fast food. The food was excellent, and the portions are huge! I gave the food 4 out of 5 stars—not because it wasn’t good, but just based on personal preference. Still, the chicken was very juicy and fresh, and the sauces were amazing.

Prices are a little on the higher side, but the quality backs it up. Next time, I’ll split a meal with my partner—it’s definitely more than enough for one person with a healthy appetite.

We’ll absolutely be back.", 'time': 1752605576, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Abhilash Sawant', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111591524659880774486/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnHHTrQLPfd31APi4nOIG7291gj68NS5TDZo3Cziir6np3uWKtqw=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba3', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '9 months ago', 'text': "Edit: taking off 1 star as the degree of hotness varies between visits. reviews:

First time visiting but would return.', 'time': 1750028641, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'J W', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110504234299419039706/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2nmenvt4XYisncxQ106tgFMlZ0jLPFzccaADj8qNBntMDNIFF=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '3 weeks ago', 'text': "While staying in the area, we stopped here to get a meal for our grandson, and it was a disappointing experience from start to finish. It began at the register; the staff member was unable to answer basic questions about the ingredients in the Steak Stroganoff, which was concerning and set a poor tone.

After paying, I waited for over 20 minutes. Despite being the only customer waiting in the restaurant, no one spoke to me or called my name. When I finally asked a kitchen worker to check on the status, he told me the food was already ready. I had been standing in the same spot where I ordered, and he bluntly informed me that orders are picked up on the other side of the front area—something no one had shared with me.

By the time I got the food, both my meal and my grandson's were lukewarm and soggy from sitting in condensation. The staff was neither knowledgeable nor friendly, and the lack of communication was unacceptable. I will not be patronizing this location again.

Tip for others: If you are new to this location, be aware that the staff may not notify you when your food is ready. Make sure to check the far side of the counter yourself, or your food will sit there getting cold.", 'time': 1769540071, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Roy Melakayil', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102253420140847500418/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIs2WlnXnTeK5Uu1kcp6XYZ02DdyeFRaUsDphWB5rbJcKlB87Tr=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba5', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '7 months ago', 'text': 'Food was okay at best. My issue was during checkout. The employee, before I could even address the tap to pay, decided to push the tip button himself saying, "oh this is how you get past that screen to pay." He pushed the button to tip on his own and acted like it was the norm.

I won't be back.', 'time': 1753224592, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Zachary Kabara', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111278559221272792184/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkWdEojQDJ-Agn8DBzr73z0u9d7eT7ZeWW8p-QKMkNIbFRW6kLoA=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': 'a month ago', 'text': 'very nice staff, fun college atmosphere. the staff have to deal with a lot here as state street gets some characters, but the handle it well. very nice to hear the staff enjoy being around each other.', 'time': 1767211328, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Dante Schrantz', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100759941773208717659/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcwA21y7rBAxlzzc97RRDaZUzHqJJuZm3SkJ4IZbIl7wpGPQ=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba4', 'rating': 4, 'relative_time_description': '4 months ago', 'text': 'The location is fairly rundown and it shows with the decoration and the state of the tables, chairs and carpeting. The staff is very friendly and service was great.', 'time': 1741121353, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Brittney Blue', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/115371353389582831097/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzCzTEcDvc8A9WpHvwkpozhJmyi0HuU4vOy5DA6DzHH1UxVg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo-ba2', 'rating': 1, 'relative_time_description': '2 weeks ago', 'text': 'Very disappointed with the experience today. Portillo’s clearly states they open at 10:00 AM — the website says 10, the phone recording says 10 — yet when we arrived and waited in line, no one opened the doors or acknowledged customers at all.

We sat there watching employees moving around inside, but no one came to the window, no one answered, and there was zero communication. If the store isn’t actually opening at 10, the hours need to be updated. Customers shouldn’t be left sitting and guessing.

reviews:

I normally give service workers the benefit of the doubt—they’re often overworked and underpaid—but this individual has been consistently rude in past visits and has also gotten my orders wrong before due to what seems like a lack of care.

Today I ordered two sausage, egg, and cheese McGriddles. I was given two McGriddles without cheese. Simple mistakes happen, and I wasn’t upset about that. The problem was how he handled it. When I asked if the order could be corrected, he became aggressive, confrontational and insisted it was my fault. He even claimed he had repeated the order back to me when I ordered—something he absolutely did not do. I come to this location often, and when this employee is on drive-thru, the only thing he ever says is “what else” in a dismissive tone, often forgetting items and acting annoyed.

Super cute decor! We will definitely be back!', 'time': 1770766756, 'translated': False}, {'author_name': 'Andy & Deb Slawek', 'author_url': 'https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102418385835595037617/reviews', 'language': 'en', 'original_language': 'en', 'profile_photo_url': 'https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIT7yI2HlON4j3TEHPJOO4E4dlakEax0ms27O6QyrMoYBacSg=s128-c0x00000000-cc-rp-mo', 'rating': 5, 'relative_time_description': '2 months ago', 'text': 'So I was told butterbitd was too expensive, but folks are wrong!

Went there with my wife on a Sunday and it was fairly busy at 1pm. I love that you are met right away by someone to take your order and explain the menu.

While driving to Butterbird, my wife already recited the menu and we decided to split the three chicken fingers plate with a side of fries. An Awesome choice!

We were given a number to place  on our table to receive our food, and it came out quickly.

But first, the atmosphere here is tremendous done in wood, with the bar in the middle of the whole building. But what was great is the tremendous  amount of booths that can seat six people or elevated table tops. The lighting was perfect, the temperature inside was perfect for the 13 degree weather and the place was very clean.

The food arrived quickly and I was in shock. Two of the chicken fingers looked like a quarter of a thigh! They were huge, well breaded but the big surprise was… the chicken melted in your mouth… literally! It was some of the best moist chicken I have ever eaten!

The fires were cut like McDonalds fries, but just seemed to lack something, like a seasoning or more salt. If anything, I think Butterbird should offer 3 different seasonings to put on the fries to jazz it up. All the food was hot.

I am glad my wife got the dill ranch to dip her chicken (and fries) because it was fantastic. I got the regular BBQ  sauce, but it really lacked any flavor. I think if they made it a smoky flavor bbq it would be great, but it was only just “ok”.

This is one place I WILL be recommending to friends. An awesome meal, great atmosphere makes it perfect Regent St place to go eat.

Oh yeah and the price? It was justified by the huge portions, great taste and atmosphere!

I am one of the top 7% Google reviewers and have had my photographs reviewed over 2.3 million times. EDIT because I had more time to sit and write this:

I've stopped in a number of times as this is a very convenient location to visit while I'm on the job. Recently, however, I've had additional reasons to stop by: Caspar Uy and his clear love of his job. Caspar started sometime this year, and every time we meet, I've left with a smile. He personally hand-crafted a "secret menu" featuring different ingredient combinations that are not all featured on the main menu, This really spices things up and keeps each JJ's visit fresh and enjoyable. He even came up with Vegetarian and Vegan specific sandwiches in addition to the omnivorous ones. He truly goes above and beyond ANY "fast food" employee I have ever met, and is more "there for the customer" in every regard. More than just taking my order, he makes me feel seen, heard, and respected, and it's hard not to notice his dedication to service and wonderful attitude in turn. SERVICE= 1000 stars.
